## 5001: human race, the (id: 5001)

Human beings are the high point of God's creation. They alone are created in his image. As a result of sin they are alienated from God and from one another, and are unable by themselves to alter this situation. The salvation of humanity rests totally upon the atoning sacrifice of Jesus Christ, received by grace through faith.

* **Associated Articles:** 5002: human race, and creation (ID: `5002@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5003: human race, and God (ID: `5003@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5004: human race, and sin (ID: `5004@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5005: human race, and redemption (ID: `5005@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5006: human race, destiny of (ID: `5006@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5002: human race, and creation (id: 5002)

Although the human race is the pinnacle of God's creative work, it shares the inherent limitations of the physical realm. Human beings are nevertheless given responsibility to manage and steward the world.

The human race is an integral part of the physical creation
-----------------------------------------------------------

### The human race was created from the ground

**[GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7)** *The Hebrew word for man, “adam” sounds like the Hebrew word for ground “adamah”.* *See also* [GEN 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17-Gen3:19); [JOB 10:8–10:9](https://ref.ly/Job10:8-Job10:9); [PSA 103:13–103:14](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13-Ps103:14)

### The human race was created on the same day as the animals

[GEN 1:24–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:24-Gen1:27)

### The human race was created from dust like the animals

[GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7), [GEN 2:19](https://ref.ly/Gen2:19)

The human race is set apart from the rest of creation
-----------------------------------------------------

### The human race is uniquely created in God's image

**[GEN 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1-Gen5:2)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27), [GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6); [JAS 3:9](https://ref.ly/Jas3:9)

### The human race is given authority to take care of creation

**[GEN 1:26–1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:28)** *See also* [GEN 2:15](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15), [GEN 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Gen9:1-Gen9:3); [PSA 8:3–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3-Ps8:8); [HEB 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:5-Heb2:8)

### The human race is created with the power of choice

**[GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17)** *See also* [GEN 2:19](https://ref.ly/Gen2:19)

### Human beings are created accountable to God for their actions

**[MAT 12:36](https://ref.ly/Matt12:36)** *See also* [EZK 18:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:20); [JHN 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/John3:18-John3:19); [ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15); [REV 2:23](https://ref.ly/Rev2:23)

### The human race is created dependent upon God

**[MAT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Matt4:4)**; **[2CO 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:5)** *See also* [2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12); [JER 10:23](https://ref.ly/Jer10:23); [JAS 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13-Jas4:15)

The human race comprises two complementary genders
--------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 2:18–2:24](https://ref.ly/Gen2:18-Gen2:24)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27), [GEN 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1-Gen5:2)

The human race is one entity with a common ancestry in Adam
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 17:26](https://ref.ly/Acts17:26)** *See also* [GEN 9:18–9:19](https://ref.ly/Gen9:18-Gen9:19), [GEN 10:32–11:1](https://ref.ly/Gen10:32-Gen11:1)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 2:7; Genesis 3:17-19; Job 10:8-9; Psalms 103:13-14; Genesis 1:24-27; Genesis 2:19; Genesis 5:1-2; Genesis 1:26-27; Genesis 9:6; James 3:9; Genesis 1:26-28; Genesis 2:15; Genesis 9:1-3; Psalms 8:3-8; Hebrews 2:5-8; Genesis 2:16-17; Matthew 12:36; Ezekiel 18:20; John 3:18-19; Romans 2:14-15; Revelation 2:23; Matthew 4:4; 2 Corinthians 3:5; 2 Chronicles 20:12; Jeremiah 10:23; James 4:13-15; Genesis 2:18-24; Acts 17:26; Genesis 9:18-19; Genesis 10:32-11:1
* **Associated Articles:** 1325: God, the Creator (ID: `1325@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4005: creation (ID: `4005@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4029: world, human beings in (ID: `4029@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5023: image of God (ID: `5023@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5082: Adam, significance of (ID: `5082@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5093: Eve (ID: `5093@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5664: children (ID: `5664@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5700: headship (ID: `5700@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5707: male and female (ID: `5707@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5708: marriage (ID: `5708@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5714: men (ID: `5714@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5745: women (ID: `5745@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5003: human race, and God (id: 5003)

Though vastly superior to the human race, God nevertheless loves, sustains and governs it, sending his Son as a human being to redeem humanity.

God is incomparably superior to the human race
----------------------------------------------

**[ISA 40:15–40:22](https://ref.ly/Isa40:15-Isa40:22)** *See also* [JOB 25:1–25:6](https://ref.ly/Job25:1-Job25:6), [JOB 38:1–38:7](https://ref.ly/Job38:1-Job38:7); [PSA 8:3–8:4](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3-Ps8:4); [ISA 31:1–31:3](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1-Isa31:3); [ACT 17:24–17:25](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24-Acts17:25); [1CO 1:20–1:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:20-1Cor1:25)

The human race is dependent upon God
------------------------------------

**[JOB 34:14–34:15](https://ref.ly/Job34:14-Job34:15)** *See also* [JOB 12:10](https://ref.ly/Job12:10); [PSA 36:5–36:6](https://ref.ly/Ps36:5-Ps36:6); [ACT 17:24–17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24-Acts17:28)

The human race is valued and loved by God
-----------------------------------------

### The human race is the object of God's care and compassion

**[PSA 103:13](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13)** *See also* [PSA 10:17–10:18](https://ref.ly/Ps10:17-Ps10:18); [LAM 3:31–3:33](https://ref.ly/Lam3:31-Lam3:33); [MAT 6:25–6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:25-Matt6:33) parallel [LUK 12:22–12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:22-Luke12:31)

### God wants to bless the human race

[GEN 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1-Gen12:3); ; [ROM 10:12](https://ref.ly/Rom10:12)

### God wants to save the human race

**[JHN 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/John3:16-John3:17)** *See also* [1TI 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:4); [2PE 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:8-2Pet3:9)

### God highly values the human race and human life

**[GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6)** *See also* [EXO 20:13](https://ref.ly/Exod20:13); [MAT 16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:26) parallels [MRK 8:36–8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:36-Mark8:37), [LUK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:25); [1PE 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:18-1Pet1:19)

God is sovereign and watches over the human race
------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 33:10–33:15](https://ref.ly/Ps33:10-Ps33:15)** *See also* [PSA 9:7–9:8](https://ref.ly/Ps9:7-Ps9:8); [PRO 5:21](https://ref.ly/Prov5:21); [DAN 5:18–5:21](https://ref.ly/Dan5:18-Dan5:21)

God will judge and punish the wickedness of the human race
----------------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 2:12–2:17](https://ref.ly/Isa2:12-Isa2:17)** *See also* [MAT 13:40–13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:40-Matt13:43); [ACT 17:29–17:31](https://ref.ly/Acts17:29-Acts17:31); [ROM 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5-Rom2:11)

God is to be feared and worshipped by the entire human race
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 33:8](https://ref.ly/Ps33:8)**; **[ROM 1:20–1:25](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20-Rom1:25)** *See also* [1CH 16:28–16:31](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:28-1Chr16:31); [PSA 96:7–96:10](https://ref.ly/Ps96:7-Ps96:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 40:15-22; Job 25:1-6; Job 38:1-7; Psalms 8:3-4; Isaiah 31:1-3; Acts 17:24-25; 1 Corinthians 1:20-25; Job 34:14-15; Job 12:10; Psalms 36:5-6; Acts 17:24-28; Psalms 103:13; Psalms 10:17-18; Lamentations 3:31-33; Matthew 6:25-33; Luke 12:22-31; Genesis 12:1-3; Romans 10:12; John 3:16-17; 1 Timothy 2:1-4; 2 Peter 3:8-9; Genesis 9:6; Exodus 20:13; Matthew 16:26; Mark 8:36-37; Luke 9:25; 1 Peter 1:18-19; Psalms 33:10-15; Psalms 9:7-8; Proverbs 5:21; Daniel 5:18-21; Isaiah 2:12-17; Matthew 13:40-43; Acts 17:29-31; Romans 2:5-11; Psalms 33:8; Romans 1:20-25; 1 Chronicles 16:28-31; Psalms 96:7-10

## 5004: human race, and sin (id: 5004)

As a result of the fall, human beings have become separated from God through sin, and are divided amongst themselves. All are in a condition of spiritual blindness, slavery and death, and are incapable of saving themselves from this situation.

All the human race is sinful
----------------------------

**[ROM 3:9–3:12](https://ref.ly/Rom3:9-Rom3:12)** *See also* [PSA 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/Ps14:1-Ps14:3), [PSA 53:1–53:3](https://ref.ly/Ps53:1-Ps53:3); [GEN 6:5–6:13](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5-Gen6:13); [JOB 15:14–15:16](https://ref.ly/Job15:14-Job15:16); [ECC 7:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:20); [ROM 1:18–1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:32); [REV 18:1–18:5](https://ref.ly/Rev18:1-Rev18:5) *Babylon symbolises human society which in its opposition to God has become thoroughly corrupt.*

The human race is estranged from God
------------------------------------

**[ISA 59:1–59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:1-Isa59:2)** *See also* [GEN 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/Gen3:8-Gen3:10), [GEN 3:22–3:24](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22-Gen3:24); [PSA 5:4–5:5](https://ref.ly/Ps5:4-Ps5:5); [EPH 2:12](https://ref.ly/Eph2:12), [EPH 4:17–4:18](https://ref.ly/Eph4:17-Eph4:18); [COL 1:21](https://ref.ly/Col1:21)

The human race is spiritually callous, blind, enslaved and dead
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/Eph2:1-Eph2:3), [EPH 4:17–4:19](https://ref.ly/Eph4:17-Eph4:19)** *See also* [ROM 1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21), [ROM 5:12–5:14](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12-Rom5:14), [ROM 6:16–6:20](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16-Rom6:20); [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4); [1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19)

The human race is divided
-------------------------

### The human race is divided individual against individual

[GEN 4:3–4:9](https://ref.ly/Gen4:3-Gen4:9); ; [ROM 1:28–1:29](https://ref.ly/Rom1:28-Rom1:29)

### The human race is divided man against woman

[GEN 3:8–3:12](https://ref.ly/Gen3:8-Gen3:12), [GEN 3:16](https://ref.ly/Gen3:16); ; [PRO 21:9](https://ref.ly/Prov21:9)

### The human race is divided nation against nation

[GEN 11:1–11:9](https://ref.ly/Gen11:1-Gen11:9); ; [MAT 24:6–24:7](https://ref.ly/Matt24:6-Matt24:7)

### The human race is divided Jew against Gentile

[ACT 10:27–10:28](https://ref.ly/Acts10:27-Acts10:28); ; [EPH 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Eph2:11-Eph2:12)

### The human race is divided rich against poor

[AMO 8:4–8:6](https://ref.ly/Amos8:4-Amos8:6); ; [JAS 2:1–2:7](https://ref.ly/Jas2:1-Jas2:7)

The human race has been weakened by sin
---------------------------------------

### The human race has become subject to death

**[GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17)**; **[ROM 6:23](https://ref.ly/Rom6:23)** *See also* [ROM 5:12](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12); [1CO 15:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:21); [JAS 1:15](https://ref.ly/Jas1:15)

### Human beings have become weak and frail

**[ISA 40:6–40:7](https://ref.ly/Isa40:6-Isa40:7)** *See also* [JOB 14:1–14:12](https://ref.ly/Job14:1-Job14:12); [PSA 90:3–90:6](https://ref.ly/Ps90:3-Ps90:6), [PSA 103:13–103:16](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13-Ps103:16); [ECC 12:1–12:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:1-Eccl12:7); [1PE 1:24–1:25](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:24-1Pet1:25)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 3:9-12; Psalms 14:1-3; Psalms 53:1-3; Genesis 6:5-13; Job 15:14-16; Ecclesiastes 7:20; Romans 1:18-32; Revelation 18:1-5; Isaiah 59:1-2; Genesis 3:8-10; Genesis 3:22-24; Psalms 5:4-5; Ephesians 2:12; Ephesians 4:17-18; Colossians 1:21; Ephesians 2:1-3; Ephesians 4:17-19; Romans 1:21; Romans 5:12-14; Romans 6:16-20; 2 Corinthians 4:4; 1 John 5:19; Genesis 4:3-9; Romans 1:28-29; Genesis 3:8-12; Genesis 3:16; Proverbs 21:9; Genesis 11:1-9; Matthew 24:6-7; Acts 10:27-28; Ephesians 2:11-12; Amos 8:4-6; James 2:1-7; Genesis 2:16-17; Romans 6:23; Romans 5:12; 1 Corinthians 15:21; James 1:15; Isaiah 40:6-7; Job 14:1-12; Psalms 90:3-6; Psalms 103:13-16; Ecclesiastes 12:1-7; 1 Peter 1:24-25

## 5005: human race, and redemption (id: 5005)

Through Jesus Christ's death on the cross and his redemption, human beings are offered a salvation that will give them spiritual life and freedom, reconcile them to God, and unite them to one another as part of a new humanity.

Salvation is offered to the human race through Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 3:14–3:17](https://ref.ly/John3:14-John3:17)** *See also* [MAT 28:18–28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:18-Matt28:20); [LUK 24:45–24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:45-Luke24:47); [ACT 2:38–2:39](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38-Acts2:39), [ACT 10:34–10:35](https://ref.ly/Acts10:34-Acts10:35), [ACT 10:44–10:48](https://ref.ly/Acts10:44-Acts10:48); [1TI 2:1–2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:7); [TIT 2:11–2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:11-Titus2:14); [REV 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:6-Rev14:7)

The Saviour was himself a human being
-------------------------------------

**[GAL 4:4](https://ref.ly/Gal4:4)**; **[1TI 2:5–2:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:5-1Tim2:6)** *See also* [MAT 1:1](https://ref.ly/Matt1:1); [ROM 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:3-Rom1:4), [ROM 8:3](https://ref.ly/Rom8:3); [PHP 2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:8); [HEB 2:17](https://ref.ly/Heb2:17)

The human race is reconciled to God through Jesus Christ's death on the cross
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 5:18–5:21](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:21)** *See also* [ROM 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1-Rom5:2); [EPH 2:14–2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:14-Eph2:18); [COL 1:19–1:22](https://ref.ly/Col1:19-Col1:22); [HEB 2:17](https://ref.ly/Heb2:17), [HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22)

The human race is united in Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------

**[GAL 3:26–3:28](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26-Gal3:28)** *See also* [JHN 10:14–10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:14-John10:16); [1CO 12:12–12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12-1Cor12:13); [EPH 2:13–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:13-Eph2:22); [COL 3:9–3:11](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:11); [REV 5:9–5:14](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9-Rev5:14)

The human race is renewed in Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------

**[EPH 2:15](https://ref.ly/Eph2:15)** *See also* [1CO 15:47–15:49](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:47-1Cor15:49); [2CO 5:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:17)

In Jesus Christ the human race is given spiritual life and freedom
------------------------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4-Eph2:5)** *See also* [ROM 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Rom5:17-Rom5:18), [ROM 8:1–8:2](https://ref.ly/Rom8:1-Rom8:2), [ROM 8:9–8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9-Rom8:11); [2CO 3:13–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:13-2Cor3:17)

* **Associated Passages:** John 3:14-17; Matthew 28:18-20; Luke 24:45-47; Acts 2:38-39; Acts 10:34-35; Acts 10:44-48; 1 Timothy 2:1-7; Titus 2:11-14; Revelation 14:6-7; Galatians 4:4; 1 Timothy 2:5-6; Matthew 1:1; Romans 1:3-4; Romans 8:3; Philippians 2:8; Hebrews 2:17; 2 Corinthians 5:18-21; Romans 5:1-2; Ephesians 2:14-18; Colossians 1:19-22; Hebrews 10:19-22; Galatians 3:26-28; John 10:14-16; 1 Corinthians 12:12-13; Ephesians 2:13-22; Colossians 3:9-11; Revelation 5:9-14; Ephesians 2:15; 1 Corinthians 15:47-49; 2 Corinthians 5:17; Ephesians 2:4-5; Romans 5:17-18; Romans 8:1-2; Romans 8:9-11; 2 Corinthians 3:13-17

## 5006: human race, destiny of (id: 5006)

All human beings must face judgment, when God will reward them according to their attitude towards him.

The human race will face final judgment
---------------------------------------

**[MAT 16:27](https://ref.ly/Matt16:27)**; **[1CO 4:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:5)** *See also* [DAN 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Dan12:1-Dan12:2); [MAL 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Mal3:16-Mal3:18); [MAT 13:40–13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:40-Matt13:43); [JHN 5:24–5:29](https://ref.ly/John5:24-John5:29); [ROM 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5-Rom2:11)

Unbelievers will be separated from God
--------------------------------------

**[2TH 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:8-2Thess1:10)** *See also* [MAT 25:31–25:46](https://ref.ly/Matt25:31-Matt25:46); [MRK 9:42–9:48](https://ref.ly/Mark9:42-Mark9:48); [LUK 13:22–13:28](https://ref.ly/Luke13:22-Luke13:28); [2PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:7); [REV 20:11–20:15](https://ref.ly/Rev20:11-Rev20:15)

Those who have faith will live in God's presence
------------------------------------------------

**[REV 21:1–21:3](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1-Rev21:3)**; **[JHN 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/John14:1-John14:3)** *See also* [ZEC 2:10–2:13](https://ref.ly/Zech2:10-Zech2:13); [REV 7:13–7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:13-Rev7:17), [REV 22:3–22:4](https://ref.ly/Rev22:3-Rev22:4)

### United in the praise of God

**[REV 7:9–7:10](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9-Rev7:10)** *See also* [ISA 2:2–2:4](https://ref.ly/Isa2:2-Isa2:4) parallel [MIC 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Mic4:1-Mic4:3); [MAT 8:11](https://ref.ly/Matt8:11) parallel [LUK 13:29](https://ref.ly/Luke13:29); [REV 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9-Rev5:10), [REV 21:22–21:27](https://ref.ly/Rev21:22-Rev21:27)

### Delivered from suffering, pain and death

**[REV 21:3–21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:3-Rev21:4)** *See also* [ISA 25:6–25:8](https://ref.ly/Isa25:6-Isa25:8), [ISA 65:17–65:25](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17-Isa65:25); [REV 7:16–7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:16-Rev7:17), [REV 22:1–22:3](https://ref.ly/Rev22:1-Rev22:3)

### Sharing in the glory of Jesus Christ

**[COL 3:4](https://ref.ly/Col3:4)**; **[1PE 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:4)** *See also* [2TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 16:27; 1 Corinthians 4:5; Daniel 12:1-2; Malachi 3:16-18; Matthew 13:40-43; John 5:24-29; Romans 2:5-11; 2 Thessalonians 1:8-10; Matthew 25:31-46; Mark 9:42-48; Luke 13:22-28; 2 Peter 3:7; Revelation 20:11-15; Revelation 21:1-3; John 14:1-3; Zechariah 2:10-13; Revelation 7:13-17; Revelation 22:3-4; Revelation 7:9-10; Isaiah 2:2-4; Micah 4:1-3; Matthew 8:11; Luke 13:29; Revelation 5:9-10; Revelation 21:22-27; Revelation 21:3-4; Isaiah 25:6-8; Isaiah 65:17-25; Revelation 7:16-17; Revelation 22:1-3; Colossians 3:4; 1 Peter 5:4; 2 Timothy 4:8

## 5008: conscience (id: 5008)

An innate ability to discern the difference between right and wrong, which Scripture describes as having its origin in God himself.

* **Associated Articles:** 5009: conscience, nature of (ID: `5009@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5010: conscience, matters of (ID: `5010@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5009: conscience, nature of (id: 5009)

The faculty, given to every individual, that is capable of producing guilt, or reassurance in the case of innocence. Though never wholly reliable, the conscience is cleansed when the individual turns to God for forgiveness. It is possible for the conscience to become deadened through lack of use.

The natural conscience
----------------------

**[ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15)** *Human beings have a built\-in ability to know what is right and wrong.*

Guilty consciences
------------------

**[GEN 42:21](https://ref.ly/Gen42:21)** *See also* [EXO 9:27](https://ref.ly/Exod9:27); [1SA 24:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:5); [2SA 24:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:10); [EZR 9:6](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:6); [PSA 40:12](https://ref.ly/Ps40:12); [JHN 8:7–8:11](https://ref.ly/John8:7-John8:11)

Clear consciences
-----------------

### Before God

**[ACT 24:16](https://ref.ly/Acts24:16)** *See also* [JOB 27:6](https://ref.ly/Job27:6); [ACT 23:1](https://ref.ly/Acts23:1); [ROM 9:1](https://ref.ly/Rom9:1); [2TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:3)

### Before others

**[2CO 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:12)** *See also* [GEN 20:5–20:6](https://ref.ly/Gen20:5-Gen20:6); [2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2); [1TH 2:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:10); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5), [1TI 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:9); [HEB 13:18](https://ref.ly/Heb13:18); [1PE 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:16); [1CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:4) *Conscience is not an infallible guide and a clear conscience does not necessarily imply innocence before God.*

Consciences cleansed by the death of Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 9:14](https://ref.ly/Heb9:14)** *See also* [PSA 51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10); [HEB 9:9](https://ref.ly/Heb9:9), [HEB 10:2](https://ref.ly/Heb10:2), [HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22); [1PE 3:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:21)

Bad or corrupted consciences
----------------------------

**[TIT 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/Titus1:15-Titus1:16)** *See also* [GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5); [EXO 7:14](https://ref.ly/Exod7:14), [EXO 8:15](https://ref.ly/Exod8:15); [JER 6:15](https://ref.ly/Jer6:15), [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9); [ACT 5:2](https://ref.ly/Acts5:2); [ROM 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5); [EPH 4:19](https://ref.ly/Eph4:19); [1TI 1:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:19), [1TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:2)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 2:14-15; Genesis 42:21; Exodus 9:27; 1 Samuel 24:5; 2 Samuel 24:10; Ezra 9:6; Psalms 40:12; John 8:7-11; Acts 24:16; Job 27:6; Acts 23:1; Romans 9:1; 2 Timothy 1:3; 2 Corinthians 1:12; Genesis 20:5-6; 2 Corinthians 4:2; 1 Thessalonians 2:10; 1 Timothy 1:5; 1 Timothy 3:9; Hebrews 13:18; 1 Peter 3:16; 1 Corinthians 4:4; Hebrews 9:14; Psalms 51:10; Hebrews 9:9; Hebrews 10:2; Hebrews 10:22; 1 Peter 3:21; Titus 1:15-16; Genesis 6:5; Exodus 7:14; Exodus 8:15; Jeremiah 6:15; Jeremiah 17:9; Acts 5:2; Romans 2:5; Ephesians 4:19; 1 Timothy 1:19; 1 Timothy 4:2
* **Associated Articles:** 2530: Jesus Christ, death of (ID: `2530@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5031: knowledge, of sin (ID: `5031@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5191: thought (ID: `5191@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5769: behaviour (ID: `5769@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6130: corruption (ID: `6130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6178: hardness of heart (ID: `6178@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6652: forgiveness (ID: `6652@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8226: discernment (ID: `8226@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8275: honesty (ID: `8275@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5010: conscience, matters of (id: 5010)

Scripture gives guidance on matters of conscience, particularly in cases where believers may reach different conclusions on certain matters of moral or spiritual choice.

Having a right attitude to Christians with different opinions
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Consciences may differ

**[ROM 14:2](https://ref.ly/Rom14:2)**

### Different conscientious decisions must not be condemned

**[ROM 14:1](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1)** *The gospel dispenses believers from all prohibitions concerning food. Those who are strong in faith realise this, and joyfully accept this liberty. Yet others are hindered from accepting this, on account of scruples about food inherited from their past life. Paul asks those with a clearer grasp of the gospel to respect anyone whose “faith is weak”, so that, in their own time, they may come to share the fulness of the liberty of the children of God.* *See also* [ROM 14:10](https://ref.ly/Rom14:10), [ROM 14:13](https://ref.ly/Rom14:13); [1CO 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:29-1Cor10:30)

### God accepts and supports people who reach different conscientious decisions

**[ROM 14:3–14:4](https://ref.ly/Rom14:3-Rom14:4)**

### God alone must judge whether decisions of the conscience are right or wrong

**[ROM 14:12–14:13](https://ref.ly/Rom14:12-Rom14:13)** *See also* [COL 2:16](https://ref.ly/Col2:16)

Decision\-making
----------------

### Decisions should honour Jesus Christ

**[ROM 14:6](https://ref.ly/Rom14:6)** *See also* [ROM 14:7–14:9](https://ref.ly/Rom14:7-Rom14:9), [ROM 14:22](https://ref.ly/Rom14:22); [1CO 10:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:31); [COL 2:20–2:23](https://ref.ly/Col2:20-Col2:23)

### Decisions should arise from convictions

**[ROM 14:5](https://ref.ly/Rom14:5)** *See also* [ROM 14:23](https://ref.ly/Rom14:23)

### Decisions should be based on good doctrine

**[1CO 10:25–10:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:25-1Cor10:26)**

Consideration of others
-----------------------

### Regard for another's position

**[1CO 10:23–10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:23-1Cor10:24)** *See also* [ROM 14:14](https://ref.ly/Rom14:14)

### Restraint of freedom for the sake of another

**[1CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9)** *“The weak” are Christians who have yet to grasp the full implications of the gospel. At this stage, they are likely to be scandalised by the full public exercise of Christian freedom on the part of those who are more mature in their faith. Paul's advice is to respect the sensitivities of the weak, and wait for these fellow believers to become spiritually mature. Paul is not suggesting that Christians should cease to exercise the liberty of faith. Rather, he is asking for pastoral sensitivity.* *See also* [ROM 14:15](https://ref.ly/Rom14:15), [ROM 14:19–14:21](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19-Rom14:21), [ROM 15:1–15:3](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1-Rom15:3); [1CO 8:10–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:10-1Cor8:13), [1CO 10:27–10:29](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:27-1Cor10:29)

Appeals to conscience
---------------------

[1KI 12:1–12:15](https://ref.ly/1Kgs12:1-1Kgs12:15); ; [ACT 10:9–10:16](https://ref.ly/Acts10:9-Acts10:16), [ACT 15:6–15:11](https://ref.ly/Acts15:6-Acts15:11) *Peter argues against circumcision for Gentile believers*; ; [1CO 8:4–8:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:4-1Cor8:8); ; [PHM 1:8–1:21](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:8-Phlm1:21); ; [GAL 2:11–2:16](https://ref.ly/Gal2:11-Gal2:16) *Consciences are not infallible.*

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 14:2; Romans 14:1; Romans 14:10; Romans 14:13; 1 Corinthians 10:29-30; Romans 14:3-4; Romans 14:12-13; Colossians 2:16; Romans 14:6; Romans 14:7-9; Romans 14:22; 1 Corinthians 10:31; Colossians 2:20-23; Romans 14:5; Romans 14:23; 1 Corinthians 10:25-26; 1 Corinthians 10:23-24; Romans 14:14; 1 Corinthians 8:9; Romans 14:15; Romans 14:19-21; Romans 15:1-3; 1 Corinthians 8:10-13; 1 Corinthians 10:27-29; 1 Kings 12:1-15; Acts 10:9-16; Acts 15:6-11; 1 Corinthians 8:4-8; Philemon 1:8-21; Galatians 2:11-16
* **Associated Articles:** 5051: responsibility (ID: `5051@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5802: care (ID: `5802@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5881: immaturity (ID: `5881@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5902: maturity (ID: `5902@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6658: freedom (ID: `6658@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8292: love (ID: `8292@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8408: decision-making (ID: `8408@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8469: respect (ID: `8469@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5012: heart (id: 5012)

A vital bodily organ. The term is used in Scripture of the inner life of God or a person. The entire inner person, though fallen, may be changed by the Holy Spirit, in which case it should show evidence of renewal.

* **Associated Articles:** 5013: heart, divine (ID: `5013@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5014: heart, human (ID: `5014@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5015: heart, and Holy Spirit (ID: `5015@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5016: heart, fallen and redeemed (ID: `5016@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5017: heart, results of renewal in (ID: `5017@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5013: heart, divine (id: 5013)

The inner thoughts, feelings, will and desires of God, as they are revealed in Scripture and in Jesus Christ.

Aspects of the heart of God
---------------------------

### His joy

**[ZEP 3:17](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:17)** *See also* [DEU 30:9](https://ref.ly/Deut30:9); [PSA 147:11](https://ref.ly/Ps147:11), [PSA 149:4](https://ref.ly/Ps149:4); [ISA 42:1](https://ref.ly/Isa42:1); [JER 9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:24); [LUK 3:22](https://ref.ly/Luke3:22)

### His compassion

**[HOS 11:8](https://ref.ly/Hos11:8)** *See also* [GEN 8:21](https://ref.ly/Gen8:21); [EXO 33:19](https://ref.ly/Exod33:19), [EXO 34:6–34:7](https://ref.ly/Exod34:6-Exod34:7); [PSA 78:38–78:39](https://ref.ly/Ps78:38-Ps78:39), [PSA 103:8–103:11](https://ref.ly/Ps103:8-Ps103:11), [PSA 106:44–106:45](https://ref.ly/Ps106:44-Ps106:45); [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10); [MAT 5:44–5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44-Matt5:45); [JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16); [ROM 9:15](https://ref.ly/Rom9:15); [2CO 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:3); [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11)

### His affection

**[DEU 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Deut7:7-Deut7:8)** *See also* [1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3) parallel [2CH 7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:16); [PSA 148:14](https://ref.ly/Ps148:14); [ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11); [JER 31:3](https://ref.ly/Jer31:3), [JER 32:41](https://ref.ly/Jer32:41)

### His intentions

**[PSA 33:11](https://ref.ly/Ps33:11)** *See also* [1SA 2:35](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:35); [JOB 10:13](https://ref.ly/Job10:13); [ISA 63:4](https://ref.ly/Isa63:4); [JER 23:20](https://ref.ly/Jer23:20), [JER 29:11](https://ref.ly/Jer29:11), [JER 30:24](https://ref.ly/Jer30:24); [ACT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Acts13:22)

### His inner pain

**[GEN 6:6](https://ref.ly/Gen6:6)** *See also* [ISA 63:9–63:10](https://ref.ly/Isa63:9-Isa63:10); [HOS 11:8](https://ref.ly/Hos11:8); [EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30)

The heart of Jesus Christ
-------------------------

### His joy

**[JHN 15:11](https://ref.ly/John15:11)** *See also* [LUK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Luke10:21); [JHN 17:13](https://ref.ly/John17:13)

### His compassion

**[MAT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Matt9:36)** *See also* [MAT 14:14](https://ref.ly/Matt14:14), [MAT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Matt15:32), [MAT 20:34](https://ref.ly/Matt20:34), [MAT 23:37](https://ref.ly/Matt23:37); [LUK 7:13](https://ref.ly/Luke7:13), [LUK 19:41](https://ref.ly/Luke19:41); [JHN 11:35–11:36](https://ref.ly/John11:35-John11:36)

### His affection

**[JHN 13:1](https://ref.ly/John13:1)** *See also* [MAT 11:28–11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:28-Matt11:29); [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21); [JHN 21:20](https://ref.ly/John21:20); [PHP 1:8](https://ref.ly/Phil1:8)

### His inner pain

**[MRK 3:5](https://ref.ly/Mark3:5)** *See also* [LUK 22:44](https://ref.ly/Luke22:44); [JHN 11:35–11:36](https://ref.ly/John11:35-John11:36), [JHN 11:38](https://ref.ly/John11:38), [JHN 12:27](https://ref.ly/John12:27)

God's people are to reflect God's heart
---------------------------------------

**[COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10)** *See also* [1SA 13:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:14); [ACT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Acts13:22); [JER 3:15](https://ref.ly/Jer3:15); [LUK 6:27–6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27-Luke6:36); [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [1CO 15:49](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:49); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18); [EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24); [1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2), [1JN 3:17](https://ref.ly/1John3:17)

## 5014: heart, human (id: 5014)

A vital bodily organ. The word also refers to anything that is central or essential, such as the inner life of a person.

The heart as a vital bodily organ
---------------------------------

**[2KI 9:24](https://ref.ly/2Kgs9:24)** *See also* [EXO 28:29–28:30](https://ref.ly/Exod28:29-Exod28:30); [2SA 18:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam18:14); [HAB 3:16](https://ref.ly/Hab3:16)

The heart as a central position
-------------------------------

**[PSA 46:2](https://ref.ly/Ps46:2)** *See also* [EXO 15:8](https://ref.ly/Exod15:8); [DEU 11:3](https://ref.ly/Deut11:3); [EZK 27:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:26); [JON 2:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:3)

The heart as the inner person
-----------------------------

### The intellect

**[LUK 2:19](https://ref.ly/Luke2:19)** *See also* [GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5); [1KI 2:441](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:441)KI [3:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9), [1KI 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:12), [1KI 10:24](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:24)[JOB 22:22](https://ref.ly/Job22:22); [PRO 14:30](https://ref.ly/Prov14:30), [PRO 14:33](https://ref.ly/Prov14:33)PRO [16:1](https://ref.ly/Prov16:1), [PRO 16:9](https://ref.ly/Prov16:9), [PRO 19:21](https://ref.ly/Prov19:21), [PRO 20:5](https://ref.ly/Prov20:5), [PRO 24:2](https://ref.ly/Prov24:2)

### The desires

**[MAT 6:21](https://ref.ly/Matt6:21)** [GEN 34:3](https://ref.ly/Gen34:3), [GEN 34:8](https://ref.ly/Gen34:8); ; [DEU 17:17](https://ref.ly/Deut17:17); ; [JOB 31:9](https://ref.ly/Job31:9); ; [MAT 5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:28); [NUM 15:39](https://ref.ly/Num15:39); [1CH 29:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:18); ; [JOB 19:27](https://ref.ly/Job19:27); ; [JHN 5:42](https://ref.ly/John5:42); [JOB 17:11](https://ref.ly/Job17:11); ; [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10) *the love of riches*; ; [LUK 12:29](https://ref.ly/Luke12:29)

### The emotions

## 5015: heart, and Holy Spirit (id: 5015)

The Holy Spirit comes to dwell within believers, renewing them and directing their hearts towards a greater love for God.

The renewal of the heart by the Holy Spirit
-------------------------------------------

**[PSA 51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10)**; **[EZK 36:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:26)** *See also* [PSA 51:12–51:17](https://ref.ly/Ps51:12-Ps51:17); [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15); [JER 24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:7); [EZK 18:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:31)

The heart as the residence of the Holy Spirit
---------------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:9](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9)** *See also* [JHN 7:37–7:39](https://ref.ly/John7:37-John7:39); [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5); [2CO 1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:22); [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6); [EPH 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:17); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27)

The heart bears the fruit of the Spirit
---------------------------------------

**[GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)**

### Love for God

**[MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30)** parallels [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37), [LUK 10:27](https://ref.ly/Luke10:27) *See also* [EXO 25:2](https://ref.ly/Exod25:2); [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5), [DEU 11:13](https://ref.ly/Deut11:13), [DEU 30:6](https://ref.ly/Deut30:6); [1KI 15:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:14)

### Faithfulness to God

**[PSA 44:18](https://ref.ly/Ps44:18)** *See also* [1KI 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:4); [1CH 29:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:18); [NEH 9:8](https://ref.ly/Neh9:8); [ACT 11:23](https://ref.ly/Acts11:23)

Other results of the Holy Spirit's indwelling of the heart
----------------------------------------------------------

### Heartfelt worship of God

**[COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16)** *See also* [1SA 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:1); [2CH 11:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr11:16), [2CH 29:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:31); [JOB 11:13](https://ref.ly/Job11:13); [PSA 9:1](https://ref.ly/Ps9:1), [PSA 33:21](https://ref.ly/Ps33:21), [PSA 86:12](https://ref.ly/Ps86:12), [PSA 138:1](https://ref.ly/Ps138:1); [ROM 15:6](https://ref.ly/Rom15:6); [EPH 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18-Eph5:19); [PHP 3:3](https://ref.ly/Phil3:3)

### Heartfelt prayer to God

**[PSA 119:145](https://ref.ly/Ps119:145)** *See also* [GEN 24:45](https://ref.ly/Gen24:45); [1SA 1:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:13); [1CH 22:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:19); [PSA 21:2](https://ref.ly/Ps21:2), [PSA 27:8](https://ref.ly/Ps27:8), [PSA 63:1](https://ref.ly/Ps63:1), [PSA 84:2](https://ref.ly/Ps84:2); [ROM 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Rom8:26-Rom8:27)

### Wholehearted obedience to God

**[PSA 119:34](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34)** *See also* [DEU 26:16](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16), [DEU 30:14–30:17](https://ref.ly/Deut30:14-Deut30:17), [DEU 32:46](https://ref.ly/Deut32:46); [1KI 14:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs14:8); [2KI 23:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:3), [2KI 23:25](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:25); [NEH 2:12](https://ref.ly/Neh2:12); [PSA 40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:8), [PSA 119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:2), [PSA 119:69](https://ref.ly/Ps119:69), [PSA 119:112](https://ref.ly/Ps119:112); [ROM 6:17](https://ref.ly/Rom6:17)

### Wholehearted trust in God

## 5016: heart, fallen and redeemed (id: 5016)

The inner thoughts and feelings of an unregenerate person are opposed to God, making that person reject God and his love. At conversion the renewing work of the Holy Spirit transforms the human heart, enabling it to love and obey God.

The unregenerate heart
----------------------

### Hostile to God

**[PSA 14:1](https://ref.ly/Ps14:1)** parallel [PSA 53:1](https://ref.ly/Ps53:1) *See also* [1KI 15:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:3); [2CH 12:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr12:14); [PRO 19:3](https://ref.ly/Prov19:3); [JHN 5:42](https://ref.ly/John5:42); [ACT 8:21–8:22](https://ref.ly/Acts8:21-Acts8:22); [ROM 1:31](https://ref.ly/Rom1:31), [ROM 8:7](https://ref.ly/Rom8:7); [HEB 3:12](https://ref.ly/Heb3:12)

### Hardened against God

**[JER 18:12](https://ref.ly/Jer18:12)** [EXO 4:21](https://ref.ly/Exod4:21), [EXO 7:3](https://ref.ly/Exod7:3), [EXO 7:14](https://ref.ly/Exod7:14), [EXO 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Exod7:22-Exod7:23), [EXO 8:15](https://ref.ly/Exod8:15), [EXO 8:32](https://ref.ly/Exod8:32), [EXO 14:8](https://ref.ly/Exod14:8); [DEU 2:30](https://ref.ly/Deut2:30); ; [ISA 6:10](https://ref.ly/Isa6:10), [ISA 42:25](https://ref.ly/Isa42:25); ; [JER 16:12](https://ref.ly/Jer16:12); ; [DAN 5:20](https://ref.ly/Dan5:20); ; [MAT 13:15](https://ref.ly/Matt13:15); ; [ACT 28:27](https://ref.ly/Acts28:27); ; [ROM 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5); ; [REV 16:9](https://ref.ly/Rev16:9), [REV 16:11](https://ref.ly/Rev16:11)

### Spiritually ignorant

**[EPH 4:18](https://ref.ly/Eph4:18)** *See also* [2SA 6:16](https://ref.ly/2Sam6:16) parallel [1CH 15:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr15:29); [ROM 1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21); [2CO 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:15), [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)

### Proud

**[PSA 73:7](https://ref.ly/Ps73:7)** *See also* [PRO 18:12](https://ref.ly/Prov18:12), [PRO 21:4](https://ref.ly/Prov21:4); [JER 48:29](https://ref.ly/Jer48:29), [JER 49:16](https://ref.ly/Jer49:16); [EZK 28:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2), [EZK 28:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:17); [OBA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Obad1:3); [REV 18:7](https://ref.ly/Rev18:7)

### Deceitful

**[JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9)** *See also* [JOB 31:33–31:34](https://ref.ly/Job31:33-Job31:34); [PSA 5:9](https://ref.ly/Ps5:9), [PSA 28:3](https://ref.ly/Ps28:3), [PSA 62:4](https://ref.ly/Ps62:4); [PRO 6:14](https://ref.ly/Prov6:14), [PRO 23:7](https://ref.ly/Prov23:7), [PRO 24:12](https://ref.ly/Prov24:12), [PRO 26:23–26:25](https://ref.ly/Prov26:23-Prov26:25); [ISA 44:20](https://ref.ly/Isa44:20); [JER 22:17](https://ref.ly/Jer22:17); [2TI 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:13)

### Sinful

**[GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5)** *See also* [JOB 36:13](https://ref.ly/Job36:13); [PSA 10:3](https://ref.ly/Ps10:3), [PSA 41:6](https://ref.ly/Ps41:6), [PSA 55:21](https://ref.ly/Ps55:21); [PRO 6:18](https://ref.ly/Prov6:18), [PRO 20:9](https://ref.ly/Prov20:9); [ISA 1:5](https://ref.ly/Isa1:5); [MAT 9:4](https://ref.ly/Matt9:4) parallels [MRK 2:8](https://ref.ly/Mark2:8), [LUK 5:22](https://ref.ly/Luke5:22); [MAT 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/Matt15:18-Matt15:19) parallel [MRK 7:20–7:23](https://ref.ly/Mark7:20-Mark7:23)

### Condemned

**[PRO 11:20](https://ref.ly/Prov11:20)** *See also* [PSA 101:4–101:5](https://ref.ly/Ps101:4-Ps101:5); [PRO 16:5](https://ref.ly/Prov16:5), [PRO 17:20](https://ref.ly/Prov17:20); [ECC 11:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:9); [ISA 10:12](https://ref.ly/Isa10:12); [JER 17:10](https://ref.ly/Jer17:10); [EZK 25:6–25:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek25:6-Ezek25:7); [ROM 1:24](https://ref.ly/Rom1:24)

Conversion: the changed heart
-----------------------------

### Convinced of need

**[JHN 16:8](https://ref.ly/John16:8)** *See also* [JER 29:12–29:14](https://ref.ly/Jer29:12-Jer29:14); [ACT 2:37](https://ref.ly/Acts2:37), [ACT 16:30](https://ref.ly/Acts16:30); [ROM 7:7](https://ref.ly/Rom7:7); [1CO 14:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:25)

### Changed by the Holy Spirit

**[EZK 36:25–36:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:25-Ezek36:27)** *See also* [JER 4:14](https://ref.ly/Jer4:14), [JER 24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:7); [EZK 11:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:19), [EZK 18:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:31); [JHN 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:6); [ROM 2:29](https://ref.ly/Rom2:29); [TIT 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:4-Titus3:5)

### Given faith

**[2CO 4:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:6)** *See also* [ACT 5:31–5:32](https://ref.ly/Acts5:31-Acts5:32), [ACT 15:9](https://ref.ly/Acts15:9), [ACT 16:14–16:15](https://ref.ly/Acts16:14-Acts16:15); [ROM 10:8–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:8-Rom10:10); [EPH 2:8](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8)

Spurious conversion
-------------------

### A less\-than\-saving change

**[1SA 10:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam10:9)** *See also* [MAT 13:5–13:6](https://ref.ly/Matt13:5-Matt13:6) parallels [MRK 4:5–4:6](https://ref.ly/Mark4:5-Mark4:6), [LUK 8:6](https://ref.ly/Luke8:6); [MAT 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Matt13:20-Matt13:21) parallels [MRK 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/Mark4:16-Mark4:17), [LUK 8:13](https://ref.ly/Luke8:13); [HEB 6:4–6:8](https://ref.ly/Heb6:4-Heb6:8), [HEB 10:26–10:29](https://ref.ly/Heb10:26-Heb10:29)

## 5017: heart, results of renewal in (id: 5017)

An individual, if renewed and led by the Holy Spirit, will be aware of new spiritual experiences and desires, and also of the Holy Spirit's work of restoring character. These things provide evidence of the grace of God at work in the life of a believer.

Inward experiences of the renewed heart
---------------------------------------

### Assurance

**[1JN 3:19–3:21](https://ref.ly/1John3:19-1John3:21)** *See also* [PSA 112:7–112:8](https://ref.ly/Ps112:7-Ps112:8); [ROM 8:14–8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14-Rom8:16); [EPH 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18-Eph1:19); [1JN 5:10](https://ref.ly/1John5:10)

### Love for God's word

**[ROM 7:22](https://ref.ly/Rom7:22)** *See also* [DEU 4:9](https://ref.ly/Deut4:9); [PSA 37:31](https://ref.ly/Ps37:31), [PSA 119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:11), [PSA 119:30](https://ref.ly/Ps119:30), [PSA 119:111](https://ref.ly/Ps119:111); [PRO 6:21](https://ref.ly/Prov6:21); [JER 15:16](https://ref.ly/Jer15:16), [JER 31:33](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33)

### Desire for holiness

**[MAT 5:8](https://ref.ly/Matt5:8)** *See also* [2CH 17:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:6); [PSA 19:14](https://ref.ly/Ps19:14), [PSA 24:3–24:4](https://ref.ly/Ps24:3-Ps24:4), [PSA 73:1](https://ref.ly/Ps73:1); [PRO 7:25](https://ref.ly/Prov7:25); [ECC 10:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl10:2); [COL 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Col3:1-Col3:2); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22); [1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)DEU [10:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet10:16); [JER 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jer4:4)

### Desire to seek God

**[1KI 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:38-1Kgs8:39)** *See also* [PSA 119:10](https://ref.ly/Ps119:10), [PSA 119:58](https://ref.ly/Ps119:58), [PSA 119:145](https://ref.ly/Ps119:145)

### Encouragement

**[PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14)** *See also* [2CH 16:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:9); [PSA 73:26](https://ref.ly/Ps73:26); [JER 51:46](https://ref.ly/Jer51:46)JHN [14:1](https://ref.ly/Jer14:1), [JHN 14:27](https://ref.ly/John14:27); [COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)[2CO 4:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:1), [2CO 4:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:14); [PHP 4:7](https://ref.ly/Phil4:7); [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2), [COL 4:8](https://ref.ly/Col4:8); [PHM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:20); [HEB 12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:3), [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5), [HEB 13:9](https://ref.ly/Heb13:9)

### Joy

**[PSA 105:3](https://ref.ly/Ps105:3)** parallel [1CH 16:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:10) *See also* [1KI 8:66](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:66) parallel [2CH 7:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:10); [PSA 4:7](https://ref.ly/Ps4:7), [PSA 16:9](https://ref.ly/Ps16:9); [ISA 65:14](https://ref.ly/Isa65:14); [ZEP 3:14](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:14); [LUK 24:32](https://ref.ly/Luke24:32); [ACT 2:46–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46-Acts2:47)

### Desire for the salvation of others

**[ROM 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Rom9:1-Rom9:3)** *See also* [ROM 10:1](https://ref.ly/Rom10:1)

### Various kinds of distress

**[PSA 143:4](https://ref.ly/Ps143:4)** *See also* [PSA 38:8](https://ref.ly/Ps38:8), [PSA 69:20](https://ref.ly/Ps69:20); [JER 4:19](https://ref.ly/Jer4:19), [JER 8:18–8:19](https://ref.ly/Jer8:18-Jer8:19), [JER 23:9](https://ref.ly/Jer23:9); [LAM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Lam1:20), [LAM 2:11](https://ref.ly/Lam2:11)ACT [21:13](https://ref.ly/Lam21:13); [2CO 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:4); [PHP 3:18](https://ref.ly/Phil3:18)

### Love for the church

**[1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22)** *See also* [ZEC 7:10](https://ref.ly/Zech7:10); [JHN 13:14–13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:14-John13:15); [ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32); [2CO 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:11-2Cor6:13), [2CO 7:2–7:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:2-2Cor7:3); [PHP 1:7–1:9](https://ref.ly/Phil1:7-Phil1:9); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5); [1JN 3:11–3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:11-1John3:18)

The renewed heart and the restoration of character
--------------------------------------------------

### Sincerity and integrity towards God and other people

**[PSA 86:11](https://ref.ly/Ps86:11)** *See also* [1KI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:6), [1KI 9:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:4); [JOB 33:3](https://ref.ly/Job33:3); [PSA 15:2](https://ref.ly/Ps15:2), [PSA 78:72](https://ref.ly/Ps78:72); [MAT 18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:35); [2CO 5:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:12); [EPH 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5-Eph6:6); [COL 3:22–3:23](https://ref.ly/Col3:22-Col3:23); [JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)

### Humility

**[PSA 131:1](https://ref.ly/Ps131:1)** *See also* [DEU 8:14](https://ref.ly/Deut8:14); [2KI 22:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:19); [2CH 32:25–32:26](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:25-2Chr32:26); [MAT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Matt5:3); [PHP 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:3-Phil2:5)

### Wisdom

**[PRO 2:10](https://ref.ly/Prov2:10)** *See also* [JOB 38:36](https://ref.ly/Job38:36); [PSA 90:12](https://ref.ly/Ps90:12); [PRO 2:2](https://ref.ly/Prov2:2), [PRO 3:1](https://ref.ly/Prov3:1), [PRO 3:3](https://ref.ly/Prov3:3), [PRO 23:15](https://ref.ly/Prov23:15)

The possibility of the renewed heart becoming faithless
-------------------------------------------------------

### The importance of self\-examination before God

**[PSA 139:23–139:24](https://ref.ly/Ps139:23-Ps139:24)** *See also* [DEU 8:2](https://ref.ly/Deut8:2), [DEU 13:3](https://ref.ly/Deut13:3); [JDG 5:15–5:16](https://ref.ly/Judg5:15-Judg5:16); [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9); [2CH 32:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:31); [PSA 7:9](https://ref.ly/Ps7:9), [PSA 26:2](https://ref.ly/Ps26:2); [PRO 17:3](https://ref.ly/Prov17:3); [JER 20:12](https://ref.ly/Jer20:12); [ACT 1:24](https://ref.ly/Acts1:24)

### Backsliding

**[HOS 5:4](https://ref.ly/Hos5:4)** *See also* [1KI 11:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:4), [1KI 11:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:9); [PSA 78:8](https://ref.ly/Ps78:8), [PSA 78:37](https://ref.ly/Ps78:37); [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13), [ISA 57:11](https://ref.ly/Isa57:11); [JER 12:2](https://ref.ly/Jer12:2); [HOS 10:2](https://ref.ly/Hos10:2); [MAL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Mal2:2); [ACT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3)

### Restoration after backsliding

**[JOL 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12-Joel2:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:29](https://ref.ly/Deut4:29), [DEU 30:2–30:3](https://ref.ly/Deut30:2-Deut30:3); [JOS 24:23](https://ref.ly/Josh24:23); [1KI 8:46–8:51](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:46-1Kgs8:51); [PSA 51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10); [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15); [JER 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jer3:17)

## 5019: human nature (id: 5019)

Scripture declares that human nature was created by God in his image and likeness, and set above all other creatures.

* **Associated Articles:** 5020: human nature (ID: `5020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5021: humanity, of Jesus Christ (ID: `5021@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5020: human nature (id: 5020)

Human nature was created by God, is corrupted by sin and can only be renewed and recreated through the grace of God. Redemption was achieved by Jesus Christ taking upon himself sinful human nature on the cross, so delivering from the power and penalty of sin.

Human nature is created by God
------------------------------

### God created humanity

**[EXO 4:11](https://ref.ly/Exod4:11)**; **[ISA 45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:12)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27); [PSA 95:6](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6), [PSA 100:3](https://ref.ly/Ps100:3); [PRO 22:2](https://ref.ly/Prov22:2); [JER 27:5](https://ref.ly/Jer27:5)

### God created human beings as male and female

**[GEN 1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:27), [GEN 5:2](https://ref.ly/Gen5:2)** *See also* [MRK 10:6](https://ref.ly/Mark10:6) parallel [MAT 19:4](https://ref.ly/Matt19:4)

### God created human beings in his image and likeness

**[COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27), [GEN 5:1](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1), [GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6); [JAS 3:9](https://ref.ly/Jas3:9)

### Human nature is created inferior to God himself

**[PSA 8:3–8:5](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3-Ps8:5)** *See also* [NUM 23:19](https://ref.ly/Num23:19); [PSA 144:3](https://ref.ly/Ps144:3); [HOS 11:9](https://ref.ly/Hos11:9)

### Human nature is given life by the Spirit of God

**[GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7)** *See also* [JOB 12:10](https://ref.ly/Job12:10), [JOB 27:3](https://ref.ly/Job27:3); [ISA 42:5](https://ref.ly/Isa42:5), [ISA 57:16](https://ref.ly/Isa57:16); [JER 38:16](https://ref.ly/Jer38:16)

### Human beings are dependent upon God

**[JER 10:23](https://ref.ly/Jer10:23)** *See also* [2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12); [PSA 16:2](https://ref.ly/Ps16:2); [MAT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Matt4:4); [2CO 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:5)

### Human beings have freedom to choose between good and evil

**[DEU 11:26–11:28](https://ref.ly/Deut11:26-Deut11:28)** *See also* [DEU 30:15–30:16](https://ref.ly/Deut30:15-Deut30:16), [DEU 30:19](https://ref.ly/Deut30:19); [JOS 24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:15); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9); [JER 26:3](https://ref.ly/Jer26:3); [EZK 18:21–18:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:21-Ezek18:23)

The components of human nature
------------------------------

### The soul

**[PSA 116:7](https://ref.ly/Ps116:7)** *The Hebrew and Greek words for “soul” are translated in various ways by the NIV, including “breath” and “life”. It refers chiefly to the principle of life.* *See also* [MRK 8:35–8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:35-Mark8:37); [LUK 1:46](https://ref.ly/Luke1:46); [1PE 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:9), [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

### The spirit

**[JAS 2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:26)** *The Hebrew and Greek words for “spirit” are translated in various ways by the NIV, including “breath”, “heart” and “mind”. It often refers to the identity\-giving aspect of human nature.* *See also* [JOB 34:14](https://ref.ly/Job34:14); [PSA 77:3](https://ref.ly/Ps77:3), [PSA 142:3](https://ref.ly/Ps142:3); [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41); [LUK 8:55](https://ref.ly/Luke8:55); [ACT 7:59](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59); [ROM 8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:16); [HEB 4:12](https://ref.ly/Heb4:12)

### The flesh

**[JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5)** *The Hebrew and Greek words for “flesh” are translated in various ways by the NIV, including “body”, “flesh” and “human nature”. The term can refer specifically to the frailty of human nature or to human nature in opposition to God.* *See also* [GEN 6:3](https://ref.ly/Gen6:3); [JOB 10:4](https://ref.ly/Job10:4); [PSA 78:39](https://ref.ly/Ps78:39); [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41); [PHP 3:3–3:5](https://ref.ly/Phil3:3-Phil3:5)

Human nature became corrupted by sin
------------------------------------

### Sin has its origins in the disobedience of Adam and Eve

[GEN 2:16](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16), [GEN 3:1–3:6](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:6); ; [ROM 5:12–5:19](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12-Rom5:19); ; [2CO 11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3); ; [1TI 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:14); ; [JAS 1:13–1:15](https://ref.ly/Jas1:13-Jas1:15)

### Sin affects human nature universally

**[ISA 64:6](https://ref.ly/Isa64:6)** *See also* [JOB 25:4](https://ref.ly/Job25:4); [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9); [JHN 3:19](https://ref.ly/John3:19); [ROM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23)

### Human nature is trapped in its sinful condition

**[ROM 7:24](https://ref.ly/Rom7:24)** *See also* [GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5); [JHN 8:34–8:36](https://ref.ly/John8:34-John8:36); [ROM 6:16–6:17](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16-Rom6:17), [ROM 7:5](https://ref.ly/Rom7:5); [EPH 2:3](https://ref.ly/Eph2:3); [2PE 2:18–2:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:18-2Pet2:19)

### Sin hardens human nature

**[1SA 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam6:6)** *See also* [EXO 8:15](https://ref.ly/Exod8:15), [EXO 8:32](https://ref.ly/Exod8:32); [PSA 95:8](https://ref.ly/Ps95:8); [PRO 28:14](https://ref.ly/Prov28:14); [HEB 3:8](https://ref.ly/Heb3:8), [HEB 3:15](https://ref.ly/Heb3:15), [HEB 4:7](https://ref.ly/Heb4:7)

### Human nature is mortal on account of sin

**[ROM 5:12](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12), [ROM 8:10](https://ref.ly/Rom8:10)** *See also* [GEN 6:5–6:7](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5-Gen6:7); [JOB 14:1–14:5](https://ref.ly/Job14:1-Job14:5); [1CO 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:22); [2CO 5:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:1); [2TI 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:10)

Human nature can be redeemed through Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ took human nature upon himself

**[JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14)**

### Jesus Christ mediated between God and humanity in his human nature

**[1TI 2:3–2:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:3-1Tim2:6)** *See also* [HEB 8:6](https://ref.ly/Heb8:6), [HEB 9:15](https://ref.ly/Heb9:15); [1JN 2:1](https://ref.ly/1John2:1)

### Jesus Christ makes possible the reversal of Adam's disobedience

**[ROM 5:19](https://ref.ly/Rom5:19)** *See also* [ROM 5:12–5:17](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12-Rom5:17)

### Jesus Christ makes possible a sharing in God's nature

[2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 4:11; Isaiah 45:12; Genesis 1:26-27; Psalms 95:6; Psalms 100:3; Proverbs 22:2; Jeremiah 27:5; Genesis 1:27; Genesis 5:2; Mark 10:6; Matthew 19:4; Colossians 3:9-10; Genesis 5:1; Genesis 9:6; James 3:9; Psalms 8:3-5; Numbers 23:19; Psalms 144:3; Hosea 11:9; Genesis 2:7; Job 12:10; Job 27:3; Isaiah 42:5; Isaiah 57:16; Jeremiah 38:16; Jeremiah 10:23; 2 Chronicles 20:12; Psalms 16:2; Matthew 4:4; 2 Corinthians 3:5; Deuteronomy 11:26-28; Deuteronomy 30:15-16; Deuteronomy 30:19; Joshua 24:15; 1 Chronicles 28:9; Jeremiah 26:3; Ezekiel 18:21-23; Psalms 116:7; Mark 8:35-37; Luke 1:46; 1 Peter 1:9; 1 Peter 2:11; James 2:26; Job 34:14; Psalms 77:3; Psalms 142:3; Matthew 26:41; Luke 8:55; Acts 7:59; Romans 8:16; Hebrews 4:12; Jeremiah 17:5; Genesis 6:3; Job 10:4; Psalms 78:39; Philippians 3:3-5; Genesis 2:16; Genesis 3:1-6; Romans 5:12-19; 2 Corinthians 11:3; 1 Timothy 2:14; James 1:13-15; Isaiah 64:6; Job 25:4; Jeremiah 17:9; John 3:19; Romans 3:23; Romans 7:24; Genesis 6:5; John 8:34-36; Romans 6:16-17; Romans 7:5; Ephesians 2:3; 2 Peter 2:18-19; 1 Samuel 6:6; Exodus 8:15; Exodus 8:32; Psalms 95:8; Proverbs 28:14; Hebrews 3:8; Hebrews 3:15; Hebrews 4:7; Romans 5:12; Romans 8:10; Genesis 6:5-7; Job 14:1-5; 1 Corinthians 15:22; 2 Corinthians 5:1; 2 Timothy 1:10; John 1:14; 1 Timothy 2:3-6; Hebrews 8:6; Hebrews 9:15; 1 John 2:1; Romans 5:19; Romans 5:12-17; 2 Peter 1:4

## 5021: humanity, of Jesus Christ (id: 5021)

See [2033: Jesus Christ, humanity of](2033.md)



## 5023: image of God (id: 5023)

Humanity is created in the image or likeness of God. This image of God, given in creation, was damaged in the fall, but may be restored through Jesus Christ.

Humanity created in God's image
-------------------------------

**[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)** *Image and likeness are probably synonymous terms in Hebrew parallelism. No physical likeness between God and humanity is intended.* *See also* [GEN 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1-Gen5:2)

### Paul implies that the divine image is associated in the first place with men

Although Paul at points seems to imply that the image of God is especially associated with males, he does not imply that this involves male supremacy: [1CO 11:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:7), [1CO 11:11–11:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:11-1Cor11:12)

### Respect for human life in God's image

**[GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6)**; **[JAS 3:9](https://ref.ly/Jas3:9)**

### The divine image implies partnership with God in the stewardship of creation

**[GEN 1:26](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26)** *See also* [PSA 8:3–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3-Ps8:8)

### The divine image includes imitating God's love and justice

**[MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48)** *See also* [DEU 10:17–10:19](https://ref.ly/Deut10:17-Deut10:19)

The image of God disfigured, though not totally destroyed, in the fall
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23)**

### Fallen humanity in contention with creation

*See also* [GEN 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17-Gen3:19)

### Fallen humanity and the exploitation of nature

[DEU 22:6–22:7](https://ref.ly/Deut22:6-Deut22:7); ; [ISA 7:23–7:25](https://ref.ly/Isa7:23-Isa7:25)

Jesus Christ the image of God
-----------------------------

**[PHP 2:6](https://ref.ly/Phil2:6)**; **[COL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Col1:15)** *See also* [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)

### He is the exact representation of God

**[HEB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:3)**

### He reveals God

**[JHN 1:18](https://ref.ly/John1:18)**

Jesus Christ is the perfect human being
---------------------------------------

**[JHN 1:4](https://ref.ly/John1:4)** *See also* [JHN 1:9](https://ref.ly/John1:9), [JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14); [PHP 2:7](https://ref.ly/Phil2:7); [HEB 2:17](https://ref.ly/Heb2:17)

Restoration of the divine image through Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------------------

### The divine image is renewed in all who are united with him by faith

**[ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29)** *See also* [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18); [EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14), [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)

### The promise of complete restoration in the future

**[1CO 15:49](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:49)**; **[1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)** *See also* [1CO 15:42](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:42), [1CO 15:45–15:48](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:45-1Cor15:48); [PHP 3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:21)

### The Christian life as a process of transformation

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)**

## 5024: inner being (id: 5024)

The deepest aspects of human nature, known completely by God, to be contrasted with the outward appearance or public image of a person.

The contrast of the inner being with the outward person
-------------------------------------------------------

### The desires of the inner being

**[ROM 7:14–7:25](https://ref.ly/Rom7:14-Rom7:25)** *See also* [PSA 51:3–51:6](https://ref.ly/Ps51:3-Ps51:6)

### The inner being is not subject to physical constraints

**[2CO 4:7–4:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:7-2Cor4:18)**

The inner being should take priority over the outward person
------------------------------------------------------------

**[1PE 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:3-1Pet3:4)** *See also* [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [EPH 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:19)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 7:14-25; Psalms 51:3-6; 2 Corinthians 4:7-18; 1 Peter 3:3-4; 1 Samuel 16:7; Ephesians 3:16-19
* **Associated Articles:** 4018: life, spiritual (ID: `4018@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4813: depth (ID: `4813@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5008: conscience (ID: `5008@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5012: heart (ID: `5012@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5062: spirit (ID: `5062@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5173: outward appearance (ID: `5173@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5844: emotions (ID: `5844@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5940: searching (ID: `5940@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5965: temperament (ID: `5965@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6166: flesh, sinful nature (ID: `6166@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8162: spiritual vitality (ID: `8162@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8164: spirituality (ID: `8164@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5025: killing (id: 5025)

Depriving another person or animal of life, usually by physical force. Scripture identifies various types of killing. While forbidding murder, killing of human beings is permitted in the form of execution and war. Animals may be killed for food or sacrifice, provided that the blood is ritually disposed of.

Murder
------

### Murder prohibited by the sixth commandment

**[EXO 20:13](https://ref.ly/Exod20:13)** parallel [DEU 5:17](https://ref.ly/Deut5:17)

### Murder prohibited from the time of Noah

*See also* [GEN 9:5–9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:5-Gen9:6); [LEV 17:11](https://ref.ly/Lev17:11)

### The life of the murderer is forfeit

[GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6)

Judicial killing
----------------

### Judicial killing permitted for capital crimes

**[EXO 21:12](https://ref.ly/Exod21:12)** *See also* [EXO 22:18–22:20](https://ref.ly/Exod22:18-Exod22:20); [DEU 17:8–17:13](https://ref.ly/Deut17:8-Deut17:13), [DEU 21:18–21:21](https://ref.ly/Deut21:18-Deut21:21), [DEU 22:21–22:27](https://ref.ly/Deut22:21-Deut22:27)

### Executed criminals are under the curse of God

**[DEU 21:23](https://ref.ly/Deut21:23)**

Unintentional killing (manslaughter)
------------------------------------

### The accidental killing of a fellow human being

**[EXO 21:13](https://ref.ly/Exod21:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:41–4:42](https://ref.ly/Deut4:41-Deut4:42)

### The provision of cities of refuge to avoid blood revenge

[DEU 19:2–19:13](https://ref.ly/Deut19:2-Deut19:13) *Blood revenge, based on [Ge 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6), refers to the judicial revenge of a family or clan against a man who accidentally kills one of their members.*

Killing in war
--------------

### Killing in a holy war

[JOS 6:17](https://ref.ly/Josh6:17), [JOS 6:21](https://ref.ly/Josh6:21)

### Killing in other wars

[DEU 20:10–20:15](https://ref.ly/Deut20:10-Deut20:15)

The killing of animals
----------------------

### Regulations for disposal of blood

[LEV 17:3–17:7](https://ref.ly/Lev17:3-Lev17:7), [LEV 17:11](https://ref.ly/Lev17:11)

### Animals may be killed at a distance from the sanctuary

[DEU 12:15–12:16](https://ref.ly/Deut12:15-Deut12:16)

### Limitations on the killing of animals

[DEU 22:6–22:7](https://ref.ly/Deut22:6-Deut22:7) *This limitation appears to be an attempt to preserve the balance of nature.*

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 20:13; Deuteronomy 5:17; Genesis 9:5-6; Leviticus 17:11; Genesis 9:6; Exodus 21:12; Exodus 22:18-20; Deuteronomy 17:8-13; Deuteronomy 21:18-21; Deuteronomy 22:21-27; Deuteronomy 21:23; Exodus 21:13; Deuteronomy 4:41-42; Deuteronomy 19:2-13; Joshua 6:17; Joshua 6:21; Deuteronomy 20:10-15; Leviticus 17:3-7; Deuteronomy 12:15-16; Deuteronomy 22:6-7
* **Associated Articles:** 5040: murder (ID: `5040@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5493: retribution (ID: `5493@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5495: revenge, and retaliation (ID: `5495@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5605: warfare (ID: `5605@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5975: violence (ID: `5975@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7338: cities of refuge (ID: `7338@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7346: death penalty (ID: `7346@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5026: knowledge (id: 5026)

A state of awareness and understanding, resulting from information which has been obtained or revealed concerning people or objects. Scripture stresses God's total knowledge of his creation and also the importance of his people knowing his will and purposes for them.

* **Associated Articles:** 5027: knowledge, God's of humanity (ID: `5027@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5028: knowledge, God as source of human (ID: `5028@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5029: knowledge, of God (ID: `5029@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5030: knowledge, of Jesus Christ (ID: `5030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5031: knowledge, of sin (ID: `5031@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 5027: knowledge, God's of humanity (id: 5027)

God knows all people comprehensively, their nature, their deeds and their thoughts. He understands every aspect of their lives, past, present and future.

God knows all people
--------------------

**[1KI 8:39](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:39)** parallel [2CH 6:30](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:30) *See also* [JOB 34:21](https://ref.ly/Job34:21); [PSA 7:9](https://ref.ly/Ps7:9); [JER 17:10](https://ref.ly/Jer17:10), [JER 23:24](https://ref.ly/Jer23:24), [JER 32:19](https://ref.ly/Jer32:19); [ACT 1:24](https://ref.ly/Acts1:24)

God knows his own people
------------------------

**[2TI 2:19](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:19)** *See also* [1CO 8:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:3); [GAL 4:9](https://ref.ly/Gal4:9)

### He knows them by name

**[ISA 43:1](https://ref.ly/Isa43:1)** *See also* [EXO 33:17](https://ref.ly/Exod33:17); [ISA 45:3–45:4](https://ref.ly/Isa45:3-Isa45:4)

### He knows them individually and intimately

**[JER 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jer1:5)** *See also* [PSA 119:168](https://ref.ly/Ps119:168), [PSA 139:1–139:16](https://ref.ly/Ps139:1-Ps139:16); [1CO 13:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:12)

### He knows their needs and troubles

**[MAT 6:31–6:32](https://ref.ly/Matt6:31-Matt6:32)** *See also* [PSA 34:15](https://ref.ly/Ps34:15), [PSA 142:3](https://ref.ly/Ps142:3); [JER 18:23](https://ref.ly/Jer18:23); [MAT 6:7–6:8](https://ref.ly/Matt6:7-Matt6:8)

### He knows their sin

**[HEB 4:13](https://ref.ly/Heb4:13)** *See also* [ISA 48:8](https://ref.ly/Isa48:8); [JER 29:23](https://ref.ly/Jer29:23); [HOS 5:3](https://ref.ly/Hos5:3); [AMO 5:12](https://ref.ly/Amos5:12)

The knowledge of Jesus Christ
-----------------------------

### He knows all people

**[JHN 2:25](https://ref.ly/John2:25)** *See also* [MAT 12:25](https://ref.ly/Matt12:25) parallel [LUK 11:17](https://ref.ly/Luke11:17); [MRK 2:8](https://ref.ly/Mark2:8) parallels [MAT 9:4](https://ref.ly/Matt9:4), [LUK 5:22](https://ref.ly/Luke5:22)

### He knows them by name

**[JHN 10:3](https://ref.ly/John10:3)** *See also* [JHN 10:14](https://ref.ly/John10:14)

### He knows their needs and troubles

**[REV 2:9](https://ref.ly/Rev2:9)** *See also* [REV 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:13)

### He knows their sins

**[REV 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/Rev3:15-Rev3:16)** *See also* [REV 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Rev3:1-Rev3:2)

### He knows their past and future

**[JHN 4:16–4:18](https://ref.ly/John4:16-John4:18)** *See also* [JHN 1:47](https://ref.ly/John1:47), [JHN 4:39](https://ref.ly/John4:39)**[MAT 26:33–26:34](https://ref.ly/Matt26:33-Matt26:34)** parallels [MRK 14:29–14:30](https://ref.ly/Mark14:29-Mark14:30), [JHN 13:37–13:38](https://ref.ly/John13:37-John13:38)

## 5028: knowledge, God as source of human (id: 5028)

All knowledge proceeds from God, although many do not acknowledge it. The pursuit of knowledge apart from God is futile and leads to pride.

God is the source of all knowledge
----------------------------------

**[PRO 2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:6)** *See also* [JOB 28:28](https://ref.ly/Job28:28); [PRO 1:7](https://ref.ly/Prov1:7), [PRO 9:10](https://ref.ly/Prov9:10)

Pursuit of knowledge apart from God led to the fall
---------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:1–3:7](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:7)** *See also* [GEN 3:22–3:24](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22-Gen3:24)

Pursuit of knowledge apart from God is futile
---------------------------------------------

**[ECC 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:11-Eccl12:12)** *See also* [ECC 1:16–1:18](https://ref.ly/Eccl1:16-Eccl1:18); [1CO 8:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:1)

Pursuit of the knowledge that proceeds from God merits divine approval
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 3:13–3:18](https://ref.ly/Prov3:13-Prov3:18)** *See also* [PRO 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:3-Prov2:5), [PRO 4:5](https://ref.ly/Prov4:5), [PRO 15:14](https://ref.ly/Prov15:14); [2PE 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5)

God bestows knowledge on certain individuals
--------------------------------------------

**[DAN 1:17](https://ref.ly/Dan1:17)** *See also* [EXO 31:1–31:5](https://ref.ly/Exod31:1-Exod31:5), [EXO 35:30–36:1](https://ref.ly/Exod35:30-Exod36:1); [1KI 3:10–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:10-1Kgs3:12); [2CH 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:10-2Chr1:12); [1CO 12:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:8)

## 5029: knowledge, of God (id: 5029)

Human knowledge of God may be a purely intellectual phenomenon, as when one knows about God through observing the results of his actions, but God's people know him in a personal way because of their relationship with him.

Knowledge of God through his actions
------------------------------------

### God acts in creation

**[ROM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20)** *See also* [PSA 19:1–19:4](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:4); [ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17)

### God acts in judgment

**[EZK 38:22–38:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek38:22-Ezek38:23)** *See also* [EXO 7:5](https://ref.ly/Exod7:5), [EXO 14:4](https://ref.ly/Exod14:4); [PSA 83:9–83:18](https://ref.ly/Ps83:9-Ps83:18); [EZK 6:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek6:13), [EZK 39:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:6), [EZK 39:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:23)

### God acts in saving his people

**[ISA 52:9–52:10](https://ref.ly/Isa52:9-Isa52:10)** *See also* [1SA 17:46–17:47](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:46-1Sam17:47); [ISA 37:20](https://ref.ly/Isa37:20), [ISA 49:26](https://ref.ly/Isa49:26)

God's people know him through his dealings with them
----------------------------------------------------

### God delivers his people

**[EXO 6:6–6:7](https://ref.ly/Exod6:6-Exod6:7)** *See also* [EXO 10:2](https://ref.ly/Exod10:2), [EXO 16:6](https://ref.ly/Exod16:6); [DEU 4:32–4:35](https://ref.ly/Deut4:32-Deut4:35); [JOS 3:10](https://ref.ly/Josh3:10), [JOS 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/Josh4:23-Josh4:24); [1KI 20:13](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:13), [1KI 20:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:28)

### God provides and cares for his people

**[EXO 16:8](https://ref.ly/Exod16:8)** *See also* [1KI 8:56–8:60](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56-1Kgs8:60); [ISA 41:17–41:20](https://ref.ly/Isa41:17-Isa41:20), [ISA 45:4–45:6](https://ref.ly/Isa45:4-Isa45:6); [EZK 37:26–37:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:26-Ezek37:28)

### In giving them his law

**[EZK 20:19–20:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:19-Ezek20:20)** *See also* [EXO 31:13](https://ref.ly/Exod31:13); [EZK 20:11–20:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:11-Ezek20:12)

### God judges and restores his people

**[EZK 11:10–11:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:10-Ezek11:12)** *See also* [NUM 14:34](https://ref.ly/Num14:34); [JER 24:5–24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:5-Jer24:7), [JER 31:33–31:34](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33-Jer31:34); [EZK 6:2–6:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek6:2-Ezek6:10), [EZK 7:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek7:4), [EZK 12:15–12:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek12:15-Ezek12:16), [EZK 20:38](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:38), [EZK 36:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:11), [EZK 37:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:14)

Knowledge of God leads to confidence in him
-------------------------------------------

**[PSA 9:10](https://ref.ly/Ps9:10)** *See also* [GEN 22:7–22:8](https://ref.ly/Gen22:7-Gen22:8); [JOB 19:25](https://ref.ly/Job19:25); [PSA 18:2](https://ref.ly/Ps18:2), [PSA 37:25](https://ref.ly/Ps37:25), [PSA 71:5–71:6](https://ref.ly/Ps71:5-Ps71:6); [ISA 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:1-Isa12:2); [DAN 11:32](https://ref.ly/Dan11:32)

## 5030: knowledge, of Jesus Christ (id: 5030)

The believer's understanding and experience of Jesus Christ, which arises from a personal relationship established through faith.

Jesus Christ is the supreme revelation of God
---------------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:6–14:10](https://ref.ly/John14:6-John14:10)** *See also* [MAT 11:27](https://ref.ly/Matt11:27); [JHN 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/John1:1-John1:2), [JHN 8:19](https://ref.ly/John8:19), [JHN 17:26](https://ref.ly/John17:26); [COL 1:15–1:20](https://ref.ly/Col1:15-Col1:20); [HEB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:3)

Knowledge of Jesus Christ acquired through a personal relationship with him
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 4:42](https://ref.ly/John4:42)** *See also* [MAT 9:4–9:8](https://ref.ly/Matt9:4-Matt9:8) parallels [MRK 2:8–2:12](https://ref.ly/Mark2:8-Mark2:12), [LUK 5:22–5:26](https://ref.ly/Luke5:22-Luke5:26); [JHN 10:38](https://ref.ly/John10:38), [JHN 14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:11)

Knowledge of Jesus Christ acquired through the work of the Holy Spirit
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:26](https://ref.ly/John15:26)** *See also* [1CO 12:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:3); [1JN 5:6–5:9](https://ref.ly/1John5:6-1John5:9)

Knowledge of Jesus Christ is associated with knowing God
--------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 17:26](https://ref.ly/John17:26)** *See also* [JHN 8:19](https://ref.ly/John8:19), [JHN 10:14–10:15](https://ref.ly/John10:14-John10:15), [JHN 10:27–10:30](https://ref.ly/John10:27-John10:30), [JHN 14:6–14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:6-John14:11), [JHN 15:15](https://ref.ly/John15:15)

Knowledge of Jesus Christ should increase consistently
------------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10)**; **[2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)** *See also* [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8)

Consequences of knowing Jesus Christ
------------------------------------

### Reconciliation with God

[2CO 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:19-2Cor5:20); ; [EPH 2:16](https://ref.ly/Eph2:16)

### Access to God

[ROM 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1-Rom5:2); ; [EPH 2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:18)

### Becoming like Jesus Christ

**[PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10)**

### Peace

*See also* [JHN 14:1](https://ref.ly/John14:1), [JHN 16:33](https://ref.ly/John16:33); [ROM 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1-Rom5:2); [EPH 2:14–2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:14-Eph2:18)

### Hope

[EPH 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:18)

### Eternal life

**[JHN 17:3](https://ref.ly/John17:3)** *See also* [JHN 10:27–10:28](https://ref.ly/John10:27-John10:28); [1JN 5:13](https://ref.ly/1John5:13), [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

### Renewal

[EPH 4:19–4:22](https://ref.ly/Eph4:19-Eph4:22)

### Unity among believers

[JHN 17:21](https://ref.ly/John17:21)

### Rejection by the world

Knowledge of Jesus Christ is to manifest itself in obedience
------------------------------------------------------------

## 5031: knowledge, of sin (id: 5031)

Originating with the fall, it is revealed by conscience, the law and the Holy Spirit.

Knowledge of sin as a result of the fall
----------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:1–3:13](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:13)** *See also* [GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17), [GEN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22)

Knowledge of sin through conscience
-----------------------------------

**[ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15)** *See also* [1SA 24:5–24:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:5-1Sam24:6); [2SA 24:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:10); [HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)

Knowledge of sin through the law
--------------------------------

**[ROM 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rom3:20)** *See also* [ROM 5:13](https://ref.ly/Rom5:13), [ROM 7:7](https://ref.ly/Rom7:7)

### The law was taught to all in Israel

**[LEV 10:11](https://ref.ly/Lev10:11)** *See also* [DEU 4:1](https://ref.ly/Deut4:1), [DEU 5:31](https://ref.ly/Deut5:31), [DEU 6:6–6:9](https://ref.ly/Deut6:6-Deut6:9)

Knowledge of sin through the convicting power of the Holy Spirit
----------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 16:7–16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:7-John16:11)** *See also* [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 3:1-13; Genesis 2:16-17; Genesis 3:22; Romans 2:14-15; 1 Samuel 24:5-6; 2 Samuel 24:10; Hebrews 10:22; Romans 3:20; Romans 5:13; Romans 7:7; Leviticus 10:11; Deuteronomy 4:1; Deuteronomy 5:31; Deuteronomy 6:6-9; John 16:7-11; 1 Thessalonians 1:5

## 5033: knowledge of good and evil (id: 5033)

Every human being has some innate knowledge of good and evil. The full knowledge of good and evil derives from God and is revealed in Scripture. The human desire of Adam and Eve to know good and evil, and thus gain independence from God, brought about the fall.

The human quest for knowledge of good and evil
----------------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22)** *See also* [GEN 2:9](https://ref.ly/Gen2:9), [GEN 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Gen3:5-Gen3:6); [2SA 14:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:17), [2SA 19:35](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:35); [EZK 28:2–28:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2-Ezek28:7)

The consequences of the attempt to attain this knowledge
--------------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:17)** *See also* [GEN 3:7–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:7-Gen3:19); [EZK 28:13–28:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:13-Ezek28:19); [ROM 1:28–1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:28-Rom1:32)

God as the source of full knowledge of good and evil
----------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 119:66](https://ref.ly/Ps119:66)** *See also* [JOB 28:28](https://ref.ly/Job28:28); [PSA 34:11–34:14](https://ref.ly/Ps34:11-Ps34:14), [PSA 111:10](https://ref.ly/Ps111:10); [ROM 7:7](https://ref.ly/Rom7:7)

The natural knowledge of good and evil
--------------------------------------

### Given in the human conscience

**[ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15)** *See also* [JOB 27:6](https://ref.ly/Job27:6); [EZK 36:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:31); [JHN 3:20](https://ref.ly/John3:20); [ACT 24:16](https://ref.ly/Acts24:16); [ROM 9:1](https://ref.ly/Rom9:1); [2CO 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:12); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5), [1TI 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:18-1Tim1:19); [1PE 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15-1Pet3:16)

### Conscience and moral decisions

[1SA 25:30–25:34](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:30-1Sam25:34); ; [1CH 21:6–21:7](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:6-1Chr21:7); ; [PSA 37:27](https://ref.ly/Ps37:27); ; [AMO 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Amos5:14-Amos5:15); ; [EPH 4:25–4:32](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25-Eph4:32)

### A natural knowledge of good and evil will not necessarily empower anyone to do good

**[ROM 7:15–7:25](https://ref.ly/Rom7:15-Rom7:25)**
