## 5970: unhappiness (id: 5970)

A sense of despondency or sadness, often linked with disappointment or loss. Scripture documents human unhappiness in response to a number of situations, while recalling God's unhappiness over the folly and rebelliousness of sinful humanity.

Unhappiness as the result of adverse circumstances
--------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 90:10](https://ref.ly/Ps90:10)**; **[MAT 26:21–26:22](https://ref.ly/Matt26:21-Matt26:22)** parallel [MRK 14:19](https://ref.ly/Mark14:19) *See also* [GEN 26:34–26:35](https://ref.ly/Gen26:34-Gen26:35), [GEN 40:6–40:7](https://ref.ly/Gen40:6-Gen40:7), [GEN 42:24](https://ref.ly/Gen42:24); [1SA 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:8), [1SA 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:15); [NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4), [NEH 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/Neh2:1-Neh2:3) *Artaxerxes queries Nehemiah's sadness*; [JOB 17:7](https://ref.ly/Job17:7), [JOB 30:25](https://ref.ly/Job30:25); [PSA 10:1](https://ref.ly/Ps10:1), [PSA 13:2](https://ref.ly/Ps13:2), [PSA 31:9](https://ref.ly/Ps31:9); [PRO 17:21](https://ref.ly/Prov17:21), [PRO 17:25](https://ref.ly/Prov17:25); [ISA 19:8–19:10](https://ref.ly/Isa19:8-Isa19:10); [JER 45:3](https://ref.ly/Jer45:3)

Unhappiness caused by loss
--------------------------

**[2SA 19:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:1)**; **[JHN 16:5–16:6](https://ref.ly/John16:5-John16:6)** *Jesus Christ had just foretold his departure.* *See also* [GEN 38:12](https://ref.ly/Gen38:12), [GEN 42:38](https://ref.ly/Gen42:38), [GEN 48:7](https://ref.ly/Gen48:7); [2SA 1:26](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:26), [2SA 14:2](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:2); [JOL 1:8](https://ref.ly/Joel1:8); [MAT 17:23](https://ref.ly/Matt17:23); [LUK 22:45](https://ref.ly/Luke22:45), [LUK 24:17](https://ref.ly/Luke24:17); [JHN 20:11](https://ref.ly/John20:11) *Mary weeps at Jesus Christ's tomb*; [ACT 20:38](https://ref.ly/Acts20:38); [PHP 2:27](https://ref.ly/Phil2:27); [1TH 4:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:13)

Unhappiness over failure and sin
--------------------------------

**[EZK 9:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek9:4)**; **[1CO 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:1-1Cor5:2)** *See also* [NUM 14:39](https://ref.ly/Num14:39); [JDG 20:26](https://ref.ly/Judg20:26), [JDG 21:6](https://ref.ly/Judg21:6); [1SA 2:33](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:33); [NEH 8:9–8:11](https://ref.ly/Neh8:9-Neh8:11); [PSA 88:1–88:9](https://ref.ly/Ps88:1-Ps88:9), [PSA 107:39](https://ref.ly/Ps107:39); [LAM 1:4–1:5](https://ref.ly/Lam1:4-Lam1:5); [EZK 21:6–21:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek21:6-Ezek21:7); [ZEC 12:10](https://ref.ly/Zech12:10); [MAT 27:3](https://ref.ly/Matt27:3) *Judas seized with remorse at his betrayal of Jesus Christ*; [LUK 22:62](https://ref.ly/Luke22:62); [ROM 9:2](https://ref.ly/Rom9:2); [2CO 2:2–2:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:2-2Cor2:5), [2CO 7:8–7:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:8-2Cor7:11)

Unhappiness caused by a person's own selfishness
------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 6:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:10)** *See also* [1KI 21:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:4); [EST 6:12](https://ref.ly/Esth6:12); [PRO 23:29–23:30](https://ref.ly/Prov23:29-Prov23:30); [MAT 19:22](https://ref.ly/Matt19:22) parallels [MRK 10:22](https://ref.ly/Mark10:22), [LUK 18:23](https://ref.ly/Luke18:23)

Jesus Christ knew unhappiness
-----------------------------

**[JHN 11:35](https://ref.ly/John11:35)** *See also* [MAT 26:38](https://ref.ly/Matt26:38) parallel [MRK 14:34](https://ref.ly/Mark14:34); [JHN 11:33](https://ref.ly/John11:33), [JHN 12:27](https://ref.ly/John12:27), [JHN 13:21](https://ref.ly/John13:21)

God also grieves
----------------

**[GEN 6:6–6:7](https://ref.ly/Gen6:6-Gen6:7)** *Prior to the flood*; **[EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30)** *See also* [GEN 18:20](https://ref.ly/Gen18:20); [1SA 15:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:11), [1SA 15:35](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:35); [2SA 24:16](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:16); [PSA 78:40](https://ref.ly/Ps78:40); [ISA 63:10](https://ref.ly/Isa63:10); [JER 42:10](https://ref.ly/Jer42:10)

God's remedy for unhappiness
----------------------------

**[LAM 3:32–3:33](https://ref.ly/Lam3:32-Lam3:33)**; **[1PE 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6)** *See also* [PSA 6:7–6:8](https://ref.ly/Ps6:7-Ps6:8), [PSA 10:14](https://ref.ly/Ps10:14), [PSA 31:9](https://ref.ly/Ps31:9), [PSA 116:1–116:6](https://ref.ly/Ps116:1-Ps116:6); [ISA 35:10](https://ref.ly/Isa35:10), [ISA 51:11](https://ref.ly/Isa51:11), [ISA 60:20](https://ref.ly/Isa60:20), [ISA 61:1–61:3](https://ref.ly/Isa61:1-Isa61:3); [JER 8:18](https://ref.ly/Jer8:18), [JER 31:12–31:13](https://ref.ly/Jer31:12-Jer31:13); [JHN 16:20–16:22](https://ref.ly/John16:20-John16:22)

## 5971: uniqueness (id: 5971)

The quality of being without an equal. Scripture stresses the uniqueness of God and of the salvation that is available only from him. Jesus Christ is the unique mediator between God and humanity.

The uniqueness of God
---------------------

**[ISA 40:25](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25)** *See also* [EXO 8:10](https://ref.ly/Exod8:10); [1SA 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:2); [ISA 40:18](https://ref.ly/Isa40:18); [1TI 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:17), [1TI 6:15–6:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:15-1Tim6:16); [JUD 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jude1:25)

### As a forgiver of sins

**[MRK 2:7](https://ref.ly/Mark2:7)**

The uniqueness of the Trinity
-----------------------------

### The three persons are distinct

All use the first person singular pronoun: [JHN 12:28](https://ref.ly/John12:28), [JHN 17:4](https://ref.ly/John17:4); ; [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2); [1CO 12:4–12:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:6); ; [EPH 4:4–4:5](https://ref.ly/Eph4:4-Eph4:5)

### God is one

**[DEU 6:4](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4)** *See also* [ISA 44:6](https://ref.ly/Isa44:6), [ISA 45:5–45:6](https://ref.ly/Isa45:5-Isa45:6); [EPH 4:6](https://ref.ly/Eph4:6); [JAS 2:9](https://ref.ly/Jas2:9)

### There is plurality in the Godhead

[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27), [GEN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22), [GEN 11:5–11:7](https://ref.ly/Gen11:5-Gen11:7); ; [ISA 6:8](https://ref.ly/Isa6:8); ; [MAT 28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:20); ; [2CO 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:14)

The uniqueness of Jesus Christ
------------------------------

### As God's Son

**[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16)** *NIV footnote “only begotten” indicates that Jesus Christ is the unique Son of God, in origin, eternity and nature.* *See also* [JHN 1:18](https://ref.ly/John1:18); [COL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Col1:15); [HEB 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:1-Heb1:3), [HEB 1:8](https://ref.ly/Heb1:8), [HEB 1:9](https://ref.ly/Heb1:9)

### As the mediator between God and humanity

**[1TI 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:5)** *See also* [JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14); [HEB 8:6](https://ref.ly/Heb8:6)

### As the sacrifice for sin

**[HEB 7:27](https://ref.ly/Heb7:27)** *See also* [ROM 6:10](https://ref.ly/Rom6:10); [HEB 9:12](https://ref.ly/Heb9:12), [HEB 10:10](https://ref.ly/Heb10:10), [HEB 10:14](https://ref.ly/Heb10:14), [HEB 10:18](https://ref.ly/Heb10:18)

### As the Saviour

**[ACT 4:12](https://ref.ly/Acts4:12)**; **[JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6)** *See also* [1JN 5:12](https://ref.ly/1John5:12)

### As the foundation

[1CO 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:11)

The uniqueness of Scripture
---------------------------

**[JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)** *See also* [2TI 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15-2Tim3:16); [HEB 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Heb1:1-Heb1:2); [REV 22:18–22:19](https://ref.ly/Rev22:18-Rev22:19)

Each human being is unique
--------------------------

**[PSA 139:13–139:16](https://ref.ly/Ps139:13-Ps139:16)** *See also* [JER 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jer1:5); [GAL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Gal1:15)

Each believer is unique
-----------------------

**[REV 2:17](https://ref.ly/Rev2:17)** *See also* [ISA 43:1](https://ref.ly/Isa43:1); [JHN 10:3](https://ref.ly/John10:3); [1CO 8:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:3), [1CO 12:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:21); [GAL 4:9](https://ref.ly/Gal4:9); [2TI 2:19](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:19)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 40:25; Exodus 8:10; 1 Samuel 2:2; Isaiah 40:18; 1 Timothy 1:17; 1 Timothy 6:15-16; Jude 1:25; Mark 2:7; John 12:28; John 17:4; Acts 13:2; 1 Corinthians 12:4-6; Ephesians 4:4-5; Deuteronomy 6:4; Isaiah 44:6; Isaiah 45:5-6; Ephesians 4:6; James 2:9; Genesis 1:26-27; Genesis 3:22; Genesis 11:5-7; Isaiah 6:8; Matthew 28:20; 2 Corinthians 13:14; John 3:16; John 1:18; Colossians 1:15; Hebrews 1:1-3; Hebrews 1:8; Hebrews 1:9; 1 Timothy 2:5; John 1:14; Hebrews 8:6; Hebrews 7:27; Romans 6:10; Hebrews 9:12; Hebrews 10:10; Hebrews 10:14; Hebrews 10:18; Acts 4:12; John 14:6; 1 John 5:12; 1 Corinthians 3:11; Jude 1:3; 2 Timothy 3:15-16; Hebrews 1:1-2; Revelation 22:18-19; Psalms 139:13-16; Jeremiah 1:5; Galatians 1:15; Revelation 2:17; Isaiah 43:1; John 10:3; 1 Corinthians 8:3; 1 Corinthians 12:21; Galatians 4:9; 2 Timothy 2:19

## 5972: unkindness (id: 5972)

Unsympathetic or cruel behaviour. It is contrary to God's character and is condemned in Scripture.

Unkindness condemned
--------------------

### In general terms

**[PRO 11:17](https://ref.ly/Prov11:17)** *See also* [PRO 17:5](https://ref.ly/Prov17:5), [PRO 25:20](https://ref.ly/Prov25:20); [EPH 4:31–4:32](https://ref.ly/Eph4:31-Eph4:32)

### Treatment of enemies

**[MAT 5:43–5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:43-Matt5:44)** *See also* [EXO 23:4–23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4-Exod23:5); [PRO 25:21](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21); [LUK 6:27–6:28](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27-Luke6:28), [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35); [ROM 12:14](https://ref.ly/Rom12:14)

### Treatment of the poor

**[PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31)**; **[1JN 3:17](https://ref.ly/1John3:17)** *See also* [DEU 15:7](https://ref.ly/Deut15:7), [DEU 24:14](https://ref.ly/Deut24:14); [PRO 21:13](https://ref.ly/Prov21:13); [ISA 3:15](https://ref.ly/Isa3:15), [ISA 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/Isa10:1-Isa10:2); [EZK 22:29](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:29); [ZEC 7:10](https://ref.ly/Zech7:10)

### Treatment of animals

**[PRO 12:10](https://ref.ly/Prov12:10)** *See also* [LEV 22:28](https://ref.ly/Lev22:28); [DEU 22:6](https://ref.ly/Deut22:6), [DEU 25:4](https://ref.ly/Deut25:4); [LUK 13:15](https://ref.ly/Luke13:15), [LUK 14:5](https://ref.ly/Luke14:5)

### Inhospitality condemned

**[1PE 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:9)** *See also* [DEU 23:4](https://ref.ly/Deut23:4); [MAT 25:41–25:43](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41-Matt25:43); [LUK 9:52–9:53](https://ref.ly/Luke9:52-Luke9:53); [HEB 13:2](https://ref.ly/Heb13:2); [3JN 1:10](https://ref.ly/3John1:10)

Some examples of unkindness
---------------------------

[1SA 11:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam11:2); ; [2SA 12:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:4); ; [2KI 25:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs25:7); ; [NEH 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/Neh5:5-Neh5:6); ; [JOB 24:2–24:12](https://ref.ly/Job24:2-Job24:12); ; [PSA 35:15](https://ref.ly/Ps35:15), [PSA 69:20–69:21](https://ref.ly/Ps69:20-Ps69:21), [PSA 109:16](https://ref.ly/Ps109:16); ; [EZK 34:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:4); ; [AMO 1:11](https://ref.ly/Amos1:11), [AMO 5:11](https://ref.ly/Amos5:11); ; [JAS 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/Jas2:15-Jas2:16)

God's kindness as a model for believers
---------------------------------------

[RUT 2:20](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:20); ; [EZR 9:9](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:9); ; [ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7); ; [ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17); ; [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4), [ROM 11:22](https://ref.ly/Rom11:22); ; [EPH 2:7](https://ref.ly/Eph2:7)

* **Associated Passages:** Proverbs 11:17; Proverbs 17:5; Proverbs 25:20; Ephesians 4:31-32; Matthew 5:43-44; Exodus 23:4-5; Proverbs 25:21; Luke 6:27-28; Luke 6:35; Romans 12:14; Proverbs 14:31; 1 John 3:17; Deuteronomy 15:7; Deuteronomy 24:14; Proverbs 21:13; Isaiah 3:15; Isaiah 10:1-2; Ezekiel 22:29; Zechariah 7:10; Proverbs 12:10; Leviticus 22:28; Deuteronomy 22:6; Deuteronomy 25:4; Luke 13:15; Luke 14:5; 1 Peter 4:9; Deuteronomy 23:4; Matthew 25:41-43; Luke 9:52-53; Hebrews 13:2; 3 John 1:10; 1 Samuel 11:2; 2 Samuel 12:4; 2 Kings 25:7; Nehemiah 5:5-6; Job 24:2-12; Psalms 35:15; Psalms 69:20-21; Psalms 109:16; Ezekiel 34:4; Amos 1:11; Amos 5:11; James 2:15-16; Ruth 2:20; Ezra 9:9; Isaiah 63:7; Acts 14:17; Romans 2:4; Romans 11:22; Ephesians 2:7

## 5973: unreliability (id: 5973)

The quality of a person or thing that cannot be trusted or relied upon. Scripture notes the unreliability of human nature, while stressing the total reliability of God.

Human nature is unreliable
--------------------------

**[PSA 78:57](https://ref.ly/Ps78:57)** *See also* [ISA 49:15](https://ref.ly/Isa49:15); [HOS 6:4](https://ref.ly/Hos6:4); [2CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:9)

### Examples of unreliable people

[GEN 40:23](https://ref.ly/Gen40:23) *the chief cupbearer*; ; [1SA 13:13–13:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:13-1Sam13:14) *King Saul*; ; [HOS 5:13](https://ref.ly/Hos5:13) *Israel*; [MAT 26:40](https://ref.ly/Matt26:40) parallels [MRK 14:37](https://ref.ly/Mark14:37), [LUK 22:45](https://ref.ly/Luke22:45); ; [MAT 26:56](https://ref.ly/Matt26:56) parallel [MRK 14:50](https://ref.ly/Mark14:50)

### Unreliable people are not to be trusted

**[PRO 25:19](https://ref.ly/Prov25:19)** *See also* [PSA 146:3–146:4](https://ref.ly/Ps146:3-Ps146:4); [ISA 2:22](https://ref.ly/Isa2:22)

False gods are unreliable
-------------------------

**[ISA 45:20](https://ref.ly/Isa45:20)** *See also* [DEU 4:28](https://ref.ly/Deut4:28); [PSA 115:4–115:8](https://ref.ly/Ps115:4-Ps115:8); [ISA 40:20](https://ref.ly/Isa40:20); [JER 10:5](https://ref.ly/Jer10:5), [JER 10:10](https://ref.ly/Jer10:10), [JER 10:14–10:15](https://ref.ly/Jer10:14-Jer10:15), [JER 51:17–51:18](https://ref.ly/Jer51:17-Jer51:18); [DAN 5:23](https://ref.ly/Dan5:23); [HAB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Hab2:18); [MAT 24:5](https://ref.ly/Matt24:5) parallels [MRK 13:6](https://ref.ly/Mark13:6), [LUK 21:8](https://ref.ly/Luke21:8)

Human wisdom is unreliable
--------------------------

**[1CO 3:19–3:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:19-1Cor3:20)** *See also* [JDG 20:36](https://ref.ly/Judg20:36); [JOB 5:13](https://ref.ly/Job5:13); [ISA 30:12–30:13](https://ref.ly/Isa30:12-Isa30:13), [ISA 59:4](https://ref.ly/Isa59:4); [EZK 28:6–28:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:6-Ezek28:7); [ROM 1:22](https://ref.ly/Rom1:22); [1CO 1:19–1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:19-1Cor1:21), [1CO 1:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:25); [COL 2:23](https://ref.ly/Col2:23)

Military strength is unreliable
-------------------------------

**[PSA 44:6](https://ref.ly/Ps44:6)** *See also* [1SA 17:45](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:45); [PSA 33:16–33:17](https://ref.ly/Ps33:16-Ps33:17); [ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1), [ISA 36:4–36:6](https://ref.ly/Isa36:4-Isa36:6); [EZK 33:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:26); [HOS 1:7](https://ref.ly/Hos1:7); [HAG 2:22](https://ref.ly/Hag2:22); [MAT 26:52](https://ref.ly/Matt26:52)

Material wealth is unreliable
-----------------------------

**[PRO 11:28](https://ref.ly/Prov11:28)** *See also* [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10); [JER 49:4](https://ref.ly/Jer49:4); [HAG 1:9](https://ref.ly/Hag1:9), [HAG 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Hag2:16-Hag2:17); [ZEC 9:3–9:4](https://ref.ly/Zech9:3-Zech9:4); [MAT 6:19](https://ref.ly/Matt6:19), [MAT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Matt13:22) parallels [MRK 4:19](https://ref.ly/Mark4:19), [LUK 8:14](https://ref.ly/Luke8:14); [1TI 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:9-1Tim6:10)

The consequences of unreliability
---------------------------------

### Unreliable actions let God down

**[HOS 11:2–11:3](https://ref.ly/Hos11:2-Hos11:3)** *See also* [ISA 5:7](https://ref.ly/Isa5:7); [JER 2:21](https://ref.ly/Jer2:21); [MAT 26:34](https://ref.ly/Matt26:34) parallels [MRK 14:30](https://ref.ly/Mark14:30), [LUK 22:34](https://ref.ly/Luke22:34); [LUK 16:10–16:12](https://ref.ly/Luke16:10-Luke16:12)

### Unreliability leads to disappointment

**[JAS 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:7-Jas1:8)** *See also* [MAT 21:30](https://ref.ly/Matt21:30), [MAT 21:43](https://ref.ly/Matt21:43); [LUK 16:10–16:12](https://ref.ly/Luke16:10-Luke16:12); [ACT 15:37–15:38](https://ref.ly/Acts15:37-Acts15:38)

Trust in unreliable things
--------------------------

### Leads to self\-delusion

**[ISA 44:20](https://ref.ly/Isa44:20)** *See also* [ISA 47:10](https://ref.ly/Isa47:10); [LUK 12:20](https://ref.ly/Luke12:20); [REV 3:17](https://ref.ly/Rev3:17)

### Leads to judgment

**[JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5)** *See also* [PSA 49:13–49:14](https://ref.ly/Ps49:13-Ps49:14), [PSA 52:5–52:7](https://ref.ly/Ps52:5-Ps52:7); [ISA 20:5](https://ref.ly/Isa20:5); [JER 46:25](https://ref.ly/Jer46:25); [AMO 6:1](https://ref.ly/Amos6:1), [AMO 6:7](https://ref.ly/Amos6:7)

Unreliable people are judged
----------------------------

**[EZK 13:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:9)** *See also* [ISA 20:6](https://ref.ly/Isa20:6); [MAL 2:7–2:9](https://ref.ly/Mal2:7-Mal2:9); [MAT 23:38](https://ref.ly/Matt23:38), [MAT 25:26–25:27](https://ref.ly/Matt25:26-Matt25:27) parallel [LUK 19:22–19:23](https://ref.ly/Luke19:22-Luke19:23)

God is never unreliable
-----------------------

**[NUM 23:19](https://ref.ly/Num23:19)** *See also* [1KI 8:56](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56); [PSA 71:6](https://ref.ly/Ps71:6); [JHN 8:26](https://ref.ly/John8:26); [2CO 1:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:20); [TIT 1:2](https://ref.ly/Titus1:2); [HEB 6:18](https://ref.ly/Heb6:18); [1JN 4:13–4:16](https://ref.ly/1John4:13-1John4:16)

## 5974: value (id: 5974)

God places inestimable value on the human soul. He paid the redemption price of the blood of his son Jesus Christ to purchase his own people who are precious to him. Everything that achieves or maintains this relationship is to be valued.

Redemptive values of people, animals and property
-------------------------------------------------

[LEV 27:1–27:25](https://ref.ly/Lev27:1-Lev27:25) *These are the values for recovering or buying back what has been dedicated to God. They were designed to teach the Israelites the great cost of redemption.*

The value of Jesus Christ
-------------------------

### The betrayal price

**[MAT 26:14–26:15](https://ref.ly/Matt26:14-Matt26:15)** parallels [MRK 14:10–14:11](https://ref.ly/Mark14:10-Mark14:11), [LUK 22:3–22:6](https://ref.ly/Luke22:3-Luke22:6) *See also* [JER 32:6–32:9](https://ref.ly/Jer32:6-Jer32:9); [ZEC 11:12–11:13](https://ref.ly/Zech11:12-Zech11:13); [MAT 27:9](https://ref.ly/Matt27:9)

### His true value

**[PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)** *See also* [MAT 13:44–13:46](https://ref.ly/Matt13:44-Matt13:46); [1PE 2:4–2:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:4-1Pet2:7)

The value of people
-------------------

### They are made in the image of God

**[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)** *Being made in God's image gives humanity intrinsic worth and dignity.* *See also* [PSA 8:3–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3-Ps8:8); [COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10); [HEB 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:6-Heb2:8)

### The inestimable value of a human soul

**[PSA 49:7–49:8](https://ref.ly/Ps49:7-Ps49:8)** *See also* [MAT 16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:26) parallel [MRK 8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:37)

### The redemptive price of a soul

**[1PE 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:18-1Pet1:19)** *See also* [MAT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:28) parallel [MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45); [ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28); [1CO 6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:20), [1CO 7:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:23); [REV 5:9](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9)

### The value of God's people to him

**[1PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:4)** *See also* [PSA 116:15](https://ref.ly/Ps116:15); [ISA 43:3–43:4](https://ref.ly/Isa43:3-Isa43:4); [MAT 6:26](https://ref.ly/Matt6:26) parallel [LUK 12:24](https://ref.ly/Luke12:24); [MAT 10:31](https://ref.ly/Matt10:31) parallel [LUK 12:7](https://ref.ly/Luke12:7); [MAT 12:12](https://ref.ly/Matt12:12)

The value of Christian life and service
---------------------------------------

### Godly character

**[1TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:8)** *See also* [1TI 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6); [1PE 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:4)

### Spiritual wisdom

[JOB 28:12–28:19](https://ref.ly/Job28:12-Job28:19); ; [PRO 3:13–3:15](https://ref.ly/Prov3:13-Prov3:15), [PRO 8:11](https://ref.ly/Prov8:11), [PRO 8:19](https://ref.ly/Prov8:19), [PRO 16:16](https://ref.ly/Prov16:16); ; [JAS 3:13–3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13-Jas3:17)

### Steadfast faith

**[1PE 1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:7)** *See also* [JOB 23:10](https://ref.ly/Job23:10)

### Faithful service

[DEU 15:18](https://ref.ly/Deut15:18); ; [MAT 10:10](https://ref.ly/Matt10:10) parallel [LUK 10:7](https://ref.ly/Luke10:7)

### Good leadership

[2SA 18:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam18:3); ; [1TI 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17-1Tim5:18)

### Friendship

**[2SA 1:26](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:26)** *See also* [1TH 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:8); [PHM 1:12](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:12), [PHM 1:16](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:16)

### A good marriage

**[PRO 31:10](https://ref.ly/Prov31:10)** *See also* [PRO 12:4](https://ref.ly/Prov12:4), [PRO 18:22](https://ref.ly/Prov18:22)

## 5975: violence (id: 5975)

Unrestrained physical or verbal force designed to hurt others, or to gain mastery over them.

The world is full of violence
-----------------------------

[GEN 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Gen6:11-Gen6:13); ; [JOB 24:2–24:4](https://ref.ly/Job24:2-Job24:4); ; [PSA 55:9](https://ref.ly/Ps55:9), [PSA 74:20](https://ref.ly/Ps74:20); ; [PRO 13:2](https://ref.ly/Prov13:2); ; [ISA 59:1–59:8](https://ref.ly/Isa59:1-Isa59:8); ; [EZK 7:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek7:23); ; [MIC 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Mic2:1-Mic2:2)

God hates violence
------------------

[PSA 11:5](https://ref.ly/Ps11:5), [PSA 139:19](https://ref.ly/Ps139:19); ; [JER 22:3](https://ref.ly/Jer22:3); ; [EZK 45:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek45:9); ; [MAL 2:16](https://ref.ly/Mal2:16)

Jesus Christ was not violent
----------------------------

[ISA 42:1–42:3](https://ref.ly/Isa42:1-Isa42:3), [ISA 53:9](https://ref.ly/Isa53:9); ; [1PE 2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:23)

Christians should not be violent
--------------------------------

[GAL 5:19–5:21](https://ref.ly/Gal5:19-Gal5:21); ; [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2), [EPH 4:31](https://ref.ly/Eph4:31); ; [PHP 4:5](https://ref.ly/Phil4:5)

Christian leaders should not be violent
---------------------------------------

[1CH 22:8–22:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:8-1Chr22:9); ; [1TI 3:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:3); ; [2TI 2:24](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:24); ; [TIT 1:7](https://ref.ly/Titus1:7)

God helps the victims of violence
---------------------------------

[2SA 22:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:3), [2SA 22:49](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:49); ; [PSA 18:48](https://ref.ly/Ps18:48), [PSA 72:14](https://ref.ly/Ps72:14), [PSA 140:1–140:4](https://ref.ly/Ps140:1-Ps140:4); ; [MAT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Matt2:13); ; [LUK 22:50–22:51](https://ref.ly/Luke22:50-Luke22:51)

Christians should help the victims of violence
----------------------------------------------

[GEN 14:14](https://ref.ly/Gen14:14); ; [2CH 28:9–28:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:9-2Chr28:15); ; [JER 38:9–38:12](https://ref.ly/Jer38:9-Jer38:12); ; [LUK 10:30](https://ref.ly/Luke10:30), [LUK 10:33](https://ref.ly/Luke10:33); ; [ACT 23:15–23:16](https://ref.ly/Acts23:15-Acts23:16)

## 5976: visiting (id: 5976)

Calling to see a person or place. Examples include pilgrims to Jerusalem and those visiting family and friends. Visiting those in need, especially the sick and bereaved, is particularly important. Individuals and churches are encouraged and strengthened by visits from other believers.

Visiting particular people or places
------------------------------------

### Pilgrims visit Jerusalem

**[LUK 24:18](https://ref.ly/Luke24:18)** *See also* [LUK 2:41](https://ref.ly/Luke2:41); [JHN 5:1](https://ref.ly/John5:1), [JHN 12:12](https://ref.ly/John12:12); [ACT 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Acts2:9-Acts2:11), [ACT 8:27–8:28](https://ref.ly/Acts8:27-Acts8:28)

### Visiting family, friends, etc

**[LUK 11:6](https://ref.ly/Luke11:6)** [EXO 2:11](https://ref.ly/Exod2:11); ; [ACT 7:23](https://ref.ly/Acts7:23); [JDG 15:1](https://ref.ly/Judg15:1); [MAT 21:17](https://ref.ly/Matt21:17); ; [MRK 11:11](https://ref.ly/Mark11:11); ; [LUK 10:38–10:42](https://ref.ly/Luke10:38-Luke10:42); ; [JHN 11:20](https://ref.ly/John11:20); [JHN 4:43–4:46](https://ref.ly/John4:43-John4:46) *Jesus Christ visits his home region of Galilee.*

### Visits from foreign dignitaries

**[2CH 9:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:1)** parallel [1KI 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:1-1Kgs10:2) *See also* [2CH 18:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:2) parallel [1KI 22:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:2); [2KI 20:12–20:13](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:12-2Kgs20:13) parallel [ISA 39:1–39:2](https://ref.ly/Isa39:1-Isa39:2); [JER 27:3](https://ref.ly/Jer27:3)

### Further examples

[GEN 34:1](https://ref.ly/Gen34:1), [GEN 42:2](https://ref.ly/Gen42:2); ; [ACT 7:12–7:15](https://ref.ly/Acts7:12-Acts7:15); ; [NUM 22:7–22:8](https://ref.ly/Num22:7-Num22:8); ; [1SA 28:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:8)

Visiting those in need
----------------------

**[JOB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Job2:11)**; **[MAT 25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:36)** *See also* [JOB 42:11](https://ref.ly/Job42:11); [MAT 25:39–25:40](https://ref.ly/Matt25:39-Matt25:40)

### The sick

### The bereaved

Visiting fellow believers
-------------------------

### Official visits

**[ACT 15:2](https://ref.ly/Acts15:2)** *See also* [ACT 11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:30), [ACT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22); [GAL 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Gal2:1-Gal2:2)

### Visiting individuals

**[TIT 3:12](https://ref.ly/Titus3:12)** *See also* [ACT 28:15](https://ref.ly/Acts28:15); [PHP 2:25](https://ref.ly/Phil2:25); [3JN 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/3John1:13-3John1:14)

## 5977: waiting (id: 5977)

Being in readiness for service or for some future appointment or event. Wild animals and the wicked lie in wait to ambush the unsuspecting; servants wait on their masters; believers and the whole creation wait for their renewal by God. God, too, waits for sinners to repent.

Waiting for future events
-------------------------

### Waiting to see what happens

[RUT 3:18](https://ref.ly/Ruth3:18); ; [JON 4:5](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:5); ; [ACT 28:6](https://ref.ly/Acts28:6)

### Waiting for a period of time

[GEN 8:10–8:12](https://ref.ly/Gen8:10-Gen8:12); ; [LEV 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Lev12:4-Lev12:5); ; [EZK 44:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:26)

Waiting for people
------------------

### Waiting to meet others

[EXO 5:20](https://ref.ly/Exod5:20), [EXO 7:15](https://ref.ly/Exod7:15); ; [2SA 16:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam16:1); ; [1KI 20:38](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:38)

### Waiting to be joined by others

**[1CO 11:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:33)** *See also* [EXO 24:14](https://ref.ly/Exod24:14); [ACT 17:16](https://ref.ly/Acts17:16), [ACT 20:5–20:6](https://ref.ly/Acts20:5-Acts20:6); [1CO 11:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:21)

### Waiting for word from others

**[JOB 29:21–29:23](https://ref.ly/Job29:21-Job29:23)** *See also* [1SA 10:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam10:8), [1SA 20:19](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:19); [2SA 15:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam15:28); [LUK 3:15](https://ref.ly/Luke3:15)

Waiting for God
---------------

### For God's instruction

[NUM 9:8](https://ref.ly/Num9:8); ; [PSA 106:13](https://ref.ly/Ps106:13); ; [HAB 2:1](https://ref.ly/Hab2:1)

### For God's promise

**[HEB 6:15](https://ref.ly/Heb6:15)** *See also* [HAB 2:3](https://ref.ly/Hab2:3); [LUK 24:49](https://ref.ly/Luke24:49); [ACT 1:4–1:5](https://ref.ly/Acts1:4-Acts1:5); [HEB 11:13](https://ref.ly/Heb11:13)

### For God's kingdom

[LUK 2:25](https://ref.ly/Luke2:25); ; [MRK 15:43](https://ref.ly/Mark15:43) parallel [LUK 23:51](https://ref.ly/Luke23:51)

### For vindication from God

**[HAB 3:16](https://ref.ly/Hab3:16)** *See also* [PSA 119:84](https://ref.ly/Ps119:84); [ISA 51:5](https://ref.ly/Isa51:5); [ZEP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:8); [REV 6:11](https://ref.ly/Rev6:11)

### For Jesus Christ's return

**[JAS 5:7–5:8](https://ref.ly/Jas5:7-Jas5:8)** *See also* [LUK 12:36](https://ref.ly/Luke12:36); [1CO 1:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:7); [1TH 1:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:10); [HEB 9:28](https://ref.ly/Heb9:28)

### Believers and creation wait for renewal

**[ROM 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:19-Rom8:21), [ROM 8:23](https://ref.ly/Rom8:23)** *See also* [ISA 65:17](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17); [ROM 8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:11); [1CO 15:42–15:43](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:42-1Cor15:43); [2PE 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:13); [1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2); [REV 21:1](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1)

Lying in wait to attack
-----------------------

### Preparing for military assault

[JOS 8:9](https://ref.ly/Josh8:9); ; [JDG 9:32–9:33](https://ref.ly/Judg9:32-Judg9:33)

### Criminals wait for victims

**[PRO 1:11–1:13](https://ref.ly/Prov1:11-Prov1:13)** *See also* [DEU 19:11](https://ref.ly/Deut19:11); [PSA 10:8](https://ref.ly/Ps10:8); [PRO 23:27–23:28](https://ref.ly/Prov23:27-Prov23:28), [PRO 24:15](https://ref.ly/Prov24:15); [JER 5:26](https://ref.ly/Jer5:26)

### The wicked lie in wait for God's servants

**[PSA 37:32](https://ref.ly/Ps37:32)** *See also* [JDG 16:2](https://ref.ly/Judg16:2) *The Philistines lay in wait for Samson*; [PSA 59:3](https://ref.ly/Ps59:3), [PSA 71:10–71:11](https://ref.ly/Ps71:10-Ps71:11), [PSA 119:95](https://ref.ly/Ps119:95); [JER 20:10](https://ref.ly/Jer20:10) *Jeremiah's enemies were looking for an opportunity against him*; [ACT 23:21](https://ref.ly/Acts23:21) *Some Jews were waiting to kill Paul.*

### Jesus Christ's enemies waited to trap him

**[LUK 11:53–11:54](https://ref.ly/Luke11:53-Luke11:54)**; **[JHN 7:1](https://ref.ly/John7:1)** *See also* [MAT 12:10](https://ref.ly/Matt12:10) parallel [MRK 3:2](https://ref.ly/Mark3:2); [MRK 11:18](https://ref.ly/Mark11:18) parallel [LUK 19:47](https://ref.ly/Luke19:47); [MRK 12:13](https://ref.ly/Mark12:13); [LUK 20:20](https://ref.ly/Luke20:20)

### Animals lie in wait for prey

[JOB 38:40](https://ref.ly/Job38:40); ; [PSA 10:9](https://ref.ly/Ps10:9); ; [JER 5:6](https://ref.ly/Jer5:6); ; [LAM 3:10](https://ref.ly/Lam3:10)

Waiting as delaying
-------------------

**[JOS 18:3](https://ref.ly/Josh18:3)** *See also* [JDG 18:9](https://ref.ly/Judg18:9); [2KI 7:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs7:9), [2KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs9:3); [ECC 5:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:4); [JER 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jer4:6); [ACT 22:16](https://ref.ly/Acts22:16)

Waiting as a servant
--------------------

**[MAT 8:15](https://ref.ly/Matt8:15)** parallels [MRK 1:31](https://ref.ly/Mark1:31), [LUK 4:39](https://ref.ly/Luke4:39) *See also* [1KI 1:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:4); [LUK 12:37](https://ref.ly/Luke12:37), [LUK 17:8](https://ref.ly/Luke17:8); [ACT 6:2](https://ref.ly/Acts6:2)

God waits for sinners to repent
-------------------------------

**[2PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:9)** *See also* [LUK 15:20](https://ref.ly/Luke15:20); [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4); [1TI 1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:16); [1PE 3:20](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:20)

* **Associated Passages:** Ruth 3:18; Jonah 4:5; Acts 28:6; Genesis 8:10-12; Leviticus 12:4-5; Ezekiel 44:26; Exodus 5:20; Exodus 7:15; 2 Samuel 16:1; 1 Kings 20:38; 1 Corinthians 11:33; Exodus 24:14; Acts 17:16; Acts 20:5-6; 1 Corinthians 11:21; Job 29:21-23; 1 Samuel 10:8; 1 Samuel 20:19; 2 Samuel 15:28; Luke 3:15; Numbers 9:8; Psalms 106:13; Habakkuk 2:1; Hebrews 6:15; Habakkuk 2:3; Luke 24:49; Acts 1:4-5; Hebrews 11:13; Luke 2:25; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:51; Habakkuk 3:16; Psalms 119:84; Isaiah 51:5; Zephaniah 3:8; Revelation 6:11; James 5:7-8; Luke 12:36; 1 Corinthians 1:7; 1 Thessalonians 1:10; Hebrews 9:28; Romans 8:19-21; Romans 8:23; Isaiah 65:17; Romans 8:11; 1 Corinthians 15:42-43; 2 Peter 3:13; 1 John 3:2; Revelation 21:1; Joshua 8:9; Judges 9:32-33; Proverbs 1:11-13; Deuteronomy 19:11; Psalms 10:8; Proverbs 23:27-28; Proverbs 24:15; Jeremiah 5:26; Psalms 37:32; Judges 16:2; Psalms 59:3; Psalms 71:10-11; Psalms 119:95; Jeremiah 20:10; Acts 23:21; Luke 11:53-54; John 7:1; Matthew 12:10; Mark 3:2; Mark 11:18; Luke 19:47; Mark 12:13; Luke 20:20; Job 38:40; Psalms 10:9; Jeremiah 5:6; Lamentations 3:10; Joshua 18:3; Judges 18:9; 2 Kings 7:9; 2 Kings 9:3; Ecclesiastes 5:4; Jeremiah 4:6; Acts 22:16; Matthew 8:15; Mark 1:31; Luke 4:39; 1 Kings 1:4; Luke 12:37; Luke 17:8; Acts 6:2; 2 Peter 3:9; Luke 15:20; Romans 2:4; 1 Timothy 1:16; 1 Peter 3:20

## 5978: warning (id: 5978)

Telling someone of coming disaster or danger or of the consequences of their action or attitude. Scripture gives strong warnings against idolatry, sin and false teaching.

Warnings of coming disaster or danger
-------------------------------------

**[GEN 41:28–41:32](https://ref.ly/Gen41:28-Gen41:32)** *See also* [GEN 19:12–19:13](https://ref.ly/Gen19:12-Gen19:13); [EST 4:12–4:17](https://ref.ly/Esth4:12-Esth4:17); [MAT 24:6–24:7](https://ref.ly/Matt24:6-Matt24:7) parallels [MRK 13:7–13:8](https://ref.ly/Mark13:7-Mark13:8), [LUK 21:9–21:11](https://ref.ly/Luke21:9-Luke21:11); [MAT 24:15–24:22](https://ref.ly/Matt24:15-Matt24:22) parallels [MRK 13:14–13:20](https://ref.ly/Mark13:14-Mark13:20), [LUK 21:20–21:24](https://ref.ly/Luke21:20-Luke21:24); [ACT 21:10–21:11](https://ref.ly/Acts21:10-Acts21:11), [ACT 23:16–23:21](https://ref.ly/Acts23:16-Acts23:21)

Warnings against idolatry
-------------------------

**[DEU 6:14–6:15](https://ref.ly/Deut6:14-Deut6:15), [DEU 8:19](https://ref.ly/Deut8:19)** *See also* [DEU 7:25](https://ref.ly/Deut7:25), [DEU 11:16](https://ref.ly/Deut11:16), [DEU 29:18–29:21](https://ref.ly/Deut29:18-Deut29:21); [JER 7:9–7:15](https://ref.ly/Jer7:9-Jer7:15), [JER 25:4–25:11](https://ref.ly/Jer25:4-Jer25:11); [1CO 10:7–10:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:7-1Cor10:11); [1JN 5:21](https://ref.ly/1John5:21)

Warnings against sin
--------------------

**[2CH 19:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:10)**; **[MAT 5:29–5:30](https://ref.ly/Matt5:29-Matt5:30)** *See also* [GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17); [ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11); [JER 21:14](https://ref.ly/Jer21:14); [EZK 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:17-Ezek3:19), [EZK 33:7–33:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:7-Ezek33:9); [JHN 5:14](https://ref.ly/John5:14); [ACT 2:40](https://ref.ly/Acts2:40); [ROM 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Rom2:8-Rom2:9), [ROM 6:23](https://ref.ly/Rom6:23); [1CO 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:9-1Cor6:10); [2TH 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:8-2Thess1:9)

Warnings against false teaching
-------------------------------

**[GAL 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Gal1:7-Gal1:8)**; **[2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17)** *See also* [MAT 10:32–10:33](https://ref.ly/Matt10:32-Matt10:33) parallel [LUK 12:8–12:10](https://ref.ly/Luke12:8-Luke12:10); [MAT 16:6](https://ref.ly/Matt16:6); [LUK 12:1](https://ref.ly/Luke12:1); [PHP 3:2](https://ref.ly/Phil3:2); [COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8); [TIT 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Titus1:10-Titus1:11); [2JN 1:7–1:11](https://ref.ly/2John1:7-2John1:11); [JUD 1:4](https://ref.ly/Jude1:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 41:28-32; Genesis 19:12-13; Esther 4:12-17; Matthew 24:6-7; Mark 13:7-8; Luke 21:9-11; Matthew 24:15-22; Mark 13:14-20; Luke 21:20-24; Acts 21:10-11; Acts 23:16-21; Deuteronomy 6:14-15; Deuteronomy 8:19; Deuteronomy 7:25; Deuteronomy 11:16; Deuteronomy 29:18-21; Jeremiah 7:9-15; Jeremiah 25:4-11; 1 Corinthians 10:7-11; 1 John 5:21; 2 Chronicles 19:10; Matthew 5:29-30; Genesis 2:16-17; Isaiah 13:11; Jeremiah 21:14; Ezekiel 3:17-19; Ezekiel 33:7-9; John 5:14; Acts 2:40; Romans 2:8-9; Romans 6:23; 1 Corinthians 6:9-10; 2 Thessalonians 1:8-9; Galatians 1:7-8; 2 Peter 3:17; Matthew 10:32-33; Luke 12:8-10; Matthew 16:6; Luke 12:1; Philippians 3:2; Colossians 2:8; Titus 1:10-11; 2 John 1:7-11; Jude 1:4

## 5979: waste (id: 5979)

The misuse and squandering of resources. God condemns the waste of resources which he provides, especially spiritual provisions such as grace and opportunity. Sometimes extravagance in God's service is mistaken for waste.

Waste of material resources
---------------------------

### Squandering is folly

**[LUK 15:13–15:16](https://ref.ly/Luke15:13-Luke15:16)** *See also* [PRO 21:20](https://ref.ly/Prov21:20), [PRO 29:3](https://ref.ly/Prov29:3); [LUK 16:1](https://ref.ly/Luke16:1); [JAS 5:1–5:6](https://ref.ly/Jas5:1-Jas5:6); [1PE 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:3-1Pet4:5)

### As a consequence of yielding to temptation

**[PRO 29:3](https://ref.ly/Prov29:3)** *See also* [PRO 5:7–5:14](https://ref.ly/Prov5:7-Prov5:14)

### Jesus Christ avoids waste

**[JHN 6:12–6:13](https://ref.ly/John6:12-John6:13)**

Spiritual resources should not be wasted
----------------------------------------

### God's grace

**[JON 2:8](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:8)** *See also* [JHN 12:35–12:36](https://ref.ly/John12:35-John12:36); [2CO 6:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:1); [GAL 4:9–4:11](https://ref.ly/Gal4:9-Gal4:11); [HEB 10:26–10:29](https://ref.ly/Heb10:26-Heb10:29), [HEB 10:35](https://ref.ly/Heb10:35); [2PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:21)

### God\-given abilities

[MAT 25:14–25:30](https://ref.ly/Matt25:14-Matt25:30); ; [LUK 19:12–19:27](https://ref.ly/Luke19:12-Luke19:27)

### Opportunities for service

**[EPH 5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:16)** *See also* [JHN 9:4](https://ref.ly/John9:4); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [COL 4:5](https://ref.ly/Col4:5)

### Spiritual teaching

**[MAT 7:6](https://ref.ly/Matt7:6)** *Spiritual teaching is wasted if inappropriate to the spiritual capacity of the hearers.* *See also* [PRO 9:7](https://ref.ly/Prov9:7), [PRO 23:9](https://ref.ly/Prov23:9); [1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14)

Examples of wasted lives
------------------------

### Esau

Esau lived for the pleasures of the moment and threw away his spiritual inheritance: [GEN 25:29–25:34](https://ref.ly/Gen25:29-Gen25:34); ; [HEB 12:16](https://ref.ly/Heb12:16)

### Samson

[JDG 16:18–16:21](https://ref.ly/Judg16:18-Judg16:21) *Though Samson did retrieve something at the end of his life, his spiritual gift of supernatural strength was largely wasted through his indulgence in sexual immorality.*

### King Saul

[1SA 16:21](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:21); ; [2SA 1:17–1:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:17-2Sam1:27) *Through natural strength and spiritual gifts Saul had the prospect of establishing a successful royal dynasty. The future was lost through disobedience and the end of his reign was wasted through jealousy.*

### Judas Iscariot

[MAT 27:3–27:5](https://ref.ly/Matt27:3-Matt27:5) *Judas had the best of opportunities\-\-three years with Jesus Christ. This was thrown away in a moment of personal ambition.*

Devotion to God is not waste
----------------------------

**[MAT 26:6–26:13](https://ref.ly/Matt26:6-Matt26:13)** parallel [MRK 14:3–14:9](https://ref.ly/Mark14:3-Mark14:9) *See also* [JHN 12:1–12:8](https://ref.ly/John12:1-John12:8)

Waste as the destruction of life and land
-----------------------------------------

### The frailty of human beings

**[JOB 13:28](https://ref.ly/Job13:28)** *See also* [JOB 33:21](https://ref.ly/Job33:21); [PSA 32:3](https://ref.ly/Ps32:3); [LAM 4:9](https://ref.ly/Lam4:9); [2CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16)

### Waste as a result of the judgment of God

**[JER 34:22](https://ref.ly/Jer34:22)** *See also* [LEV 26:31–26:33](https://ref.ly/Lev26:31-Lev26:33), [LEV 26:39](https://ref.ly/Lev26:39); [NUM 5:21](https://ref.ly/Num5:21); [DEU 28:22](https://ref.ly/Deut28:22), [DEU 29:23](https://ref.ly/Deut29:23), [DEU 32:24](https://ref.ly/Deut32:24); [PSA 106:43](https://ref.ly/Ps106:43); [ISA 24:1](https://ref.ly/Isa24:1), [ISA 24:3](https://ref.ly/Isa24:3); [EZK 4:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek4:17); [HOS 5:9](https://ref.ly/Hos5:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Luke 15:13-16; Proverbs 21:20; Proverbs 29:3; Luke 16:1; James 5:1-6; 1 Peter 4:3-5; Proverbs 5:7-14; John 6:12-13; Jonah 2:8; John 12:35-36; 2 Corinthians 6:1; Galatians 4:9-11; Hebrews 10:26-29; Hebrews 10:35; 2 Peter 2:21; Matthew 25:14-30; Luke 19:12-27; Ephesians 5:16; John 9:4; Galatians 6:10; Colossians 4:5; Matthew 7:6; Proverbs 9:7; Proverbs 23:9; 1 Corinthians 2:14; Genesis 25:29-34; Hebrews 12:16; Judges 16:18-21; 1 Samuel 16:21; 2 Samuel 1:17-27; Matthew 27:3-5; Matthew 26:6-13; Mark 14:3-9; John 12:1-8; Job 13:28; Job 33:21; Psalms 32:3; Lamentations 4:9; 2 Corinthians 4:16; Jeremiah 34:22; Leviticus 26:31-33; Leviticus 26:39; Numbers 5:21; Deuteronomy 28:22; Deuteronomy 29:23; Deuteronomy 32:24; Psalms 106:43; Isaiah 24:1; Isaiah 24:3; Ezekiel 4:17; Hosea 5:9
